Name: Skyborne
Description:
Skyborne is a global modern airline training academy headquartered at Gloucestershire Airport in the UK, with additional training facilities in Vero Beach, Florida, US and Bournemouth Airport, UK. Established by industry experts, Skyborne brings a fresh approach to airline pilot training.
 
We set ourselves the highest standards and believe that work should be both satisfying and fun. At the core of Skyborne is a culture shaped by our values and pillars: we champion creativity in everything we do, foster a supportive, team-focused environment and set the bar high for quality and professionalism. We’re a people-first company and a motivated, passionate team who take pride in giving our trainees the strongest start to their aviation careers.
 
We employ a carefully selected team of professionals who are committed to shaping the next generation of pilots.

Name: Airbus Flight Academy Europe
Description:
Airbus Flight Academy Europe is a 100% subsidiary of Airbus Group. It was created in 2006 to supply the training assets and services to support the French Air Force and French Navy. Since 2019, Airbus Flight Academy Europe deploys its own pilot training capacity while joining the Airbus Pilot Cadet Training Programme.
Since 2019, Airbus Flight Academy Europe deploys its own flight school where future airline and military pilots are trained. To that end, Airbus Flight Academy Europe is a full member of the Airbus Cadet Pilot Training Program and delivers excellent training under the Airbus ATO approval.Airbus Flight Academy Europe has its own fleet (Grob, Cirrus, Diamond), maintained in the best conditions by technical experts in a secure, controlled and modern environment.
Airbus Flight Academy Europe is accredited of the following agreements delivered by the ad-hoc authorities, e.g. the French DGAC for civilian aircraft or the DSAE, a French MoD entity, for state aircraft. The company has the approvals for the maintenance of aircraft: EASA PART CAMO, EASA PART 145, EMAR/FRM, EMAR/FR 145, ISO 9001-2015 & ISO 14001-2015. 
Airbus Flight Academy Europe is located on 6 permanent sites in France: Avord, Angoulême, Cognac, Lann Bihoué, Lanvéoc et Salon de Provence. The company's headquarters and flight school are located in Angoulême.

Name: IFA - International Flight Academy
Description:
Prime flight school present in the aviation market for over 25 years. The academy with the largest range of training courses in the aviation industry in Portugal: pilots, aircraft mechanics and cabin crew (EASA). 

We have highly qualified professionals, ultra-modern technology and equipment to ensure that students receive quality and excellent training throughout their entire learning journey. 

IFA - International Flight Academy, is an authorized training organization (ATO), with initial and advanced pilot training, being also specialized in Type Rating courses. 
As aviation experts, our commitment is to make dreams come true.

Name: Eagle Eye Innovations Ltd
Description: Eagle Eye Innovations LTD is a UK based Remotely Piloted Air System (RPAS)  Company that specialises in training and consultancy. All our operations staff come from an ex military/commercial aviation background and possess a wealth of experience unparalleled in the commercial RPAS industry.

Name: U.S. Aviation Training Solutions
Description:
U.S Aviation Training Solutions has, for more than 30 years, served more than 120 countries and left an indelible mark on the Helicopter Industry, becoming the premier provider of professional Helicopter Pilot Training. Thousands of professional military and civil aviators started their pilots’ careers in our hallways and on our ramp. 
 
USATS offers a wide range of helicopter and fixed wing pilot training courses. From individual Private Pilot Licenses (PPL), Commercial Pilot Licenses (CPL) and Instrument Ratings (IR) to our fully integrated Professional Pilot training packages, we have a solution to meet everyone's aspirations. 
 
USATS also offers programs for experienced military pilots wishing to convert to civilian operations or switch from rotary to fixed wing flying.

In addition to learning excellent aircraft technical knowledge and diverse handing skills, a USATS pilot graduates with a deep-rooted understanding of safe operating culture, crew resource management, threat and error management and risk management practices. 
 
These are skills essential to maintaining safe flight operations in today’s highly complex aircraft and challenging operating environments; they are also what makes a USATS pilot stand out to a potential employer.
 
In addition to our basic training courses, USATS pilots can also undertake a wide range of specific training programs, such as our FAA CPL(H), EASA CPL(H) with ATPL/IR(H) Theoretical Knowledge Credit and IOGP590 accelerated command programs. 
 
These courses deliver graduates who are fully compliant with relevant industry sector standards and are ready to play a value adding frontline role in operations from day one. 
 
USATS courses come with the assurance of FAA Part 141 and EASA approvals and in some cases can be taught at our clients’ location, outside of the United States. USATS is also the only school in the United States approved to deliver the complex EASA CPL(H) with ATPL/IR(H) Theoretical Knowledge Credit course.

Name: Aeropyrenees
Description:
L’école d’aviation Aéropyrénées a été fondée en 1970 sur l’aéroport de Perpignan. Aéropyrénées est la première école professionnelle de pilotage du secteur privé en France. Devenue une référence de la formation pilote de ligne, Aéropyrénées dispose désormais de plusieurs sites implantés dans plusieurs villes et pays : Paris (Toussus-le-Noble), Dordogne (Belves & Sarlat), Martinique, Tunisie, Maroc …

Depuis sa création, l’école d’aviation Aéropyrénées totalise plus de 350 000 heures de formation pilote de ligne. En 2020 Aéropyrénées a dispensé plus de 350 actes de formation et a réalisé plus de 7000 heures de vol sur la trentaine d’avions monomoteurs et bimoteurs que constitue sa flotte.

De l’équipe pédagogique à la flotte d’appareils, découvrez tous les outils mis à la disposition des stagiaires en formation pilote de ligne.

Name: RheinMain Flightcenter GmbH
Description:
Wir machen Ihren Traum vom Fliegen wahr!

Das RheinMain Flightcenter ist Ihr renommierter und professioneller Partner für die sichere Ausbildung zum Piloten - auf Ihrem Wunschflugzeug, zu Ihren Wunschterminen und in dem Zeitrahmen, den Sie uns vorgeben.
Daneben verchartern wir an Inhaber einer Pilotenlizenz eine der modernsten und hochwertigsten Flotten des RheinMain-Gebietes, hierunter mehrere Flugzeuge von Cirrus wie etwa unser Flaggschiff - eine wunderschöne Cirrus SR 20 G3. Wir sind herstellerunabhängig und kaufen nur solche neuen oder jungen Flugzeuge, die unseren hohen Ansprüchen genügen und die wir für die besten ihrer jeweiligen Klasse halten. Vom Zweisitzer mit Glascockpit bis zum hochkomfortablen und schnellen viersitzigen Reiseflugzeug mit Fallschirmsystem – bei uns bleiben keine Wünsche offen!

Das RheinMain Flightcenter hat seit seiner Gründung in 2010 bereits eine sehr erfolgreiche Strecke zurückgelegt und startet nun vollends durch - als Nummer 1 im RheinMain-Gebiet nach Schülerzahlen und Flugbewegungen, mit unschlagbarem Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis, mit kompromisslosem Verständnis von Sicherheit und Service und mit maßgeschneiderten Lösungen. 

Als EASA-zugelassene ATO (Approved Training Organisation) stellen wir Ihnen herausragend qualifizierte und erfahrene Fluglehrer zur Verfügung. Die meisten unserer Fluglehrer sind Berufs- oder gar Verkehrspiloten; alle jedoch verfügen über eine Qualifikation, die ihresgleichen sucht.

Wir sind kein Verein, und wir sind gewiss anders als andere. 
Wir verstehen, dass Sie wenig Zeit und ehrgeizige Ziele haben und dass Sie das Besondere gewohnt sind oder anstreben. Und deshalb verstehen wir uns als Ihr Premium-Dienstleister, als One-Stop-Shop für Flug-Enthusiasten und solche, die ihren Traum vom Fliegen wahr machen möchten. 

Warten Sie nicht auf irgendwann, sondern starten Sie jetzt mit uns Ihre Ausbildung zum Privatpiloten.
Es erwartet Sie die Liebe zum Fliegen - und Freiheit!

Aviation solutions: custom made.

Name: Asia Drone Technical Academy
Description:
Asia Drone Technical Academy, the drone arm of SG Academy, holds a truly unique position in Malaysia’s training landscape. We are the first institution to combine two national pillars of recognition:

Civil Aviation Authority of Malaysia (CAAM) approval as a licensed Remote Pilot Training Organisation (RPTO), and

Full-fledged Malaysian Skills Certificate (SKM) programs at Level 2 & Level 3 under the Department of Skills Development (JPK).

This pioneering combination makes us the only academy where graduates leave with both aviation licensing (RCoC-B and advanced modules like EVLOS & AGR) and government-recognised TVET qualifications (SKM) — a dual credential pathway that sets our pilots apart locally and internationally.

We don’t just train drone operators; we produce career-ready professionals who are compliant with CAAM regulations, recognised under JPK, and skilled in real-world applications — agriculture, surveying, mapping, inspection, media, and beyond.

By uniting RPTO licensing with SKM certification, we have created Malaysia’s most complete drone education ecosystem — the first and only of its kind.

Name: Novation Academy
Description:
Novation Academy is advance aviation training facility.
Our name, “Novation” made from “Aviation” + “Innovation”and we are striving to bring innovation into aviation training.
Designed to be the best advanced flight training academy in the South-East Asia, we are on a journey to become a key part of aviation’s future in Cambodia and Asia, using advanced training technologies and progressive curriculum to empower students to go beyond the ordinary and become world-class pilots.

Name: EPAG NG
Description:
EPAG NG is a flying school created and managed by four instructors from the historic École de Pilotage Amaury de la Grange.

Their objective : to provide you with their know-how gained through training airline pilots for some of the largest national and international carriers.

Experience, expertise and excellence are the watchwords for the passing on of their knowledge.

They are experienced instructors, used to working with Airlines Air France, Air Algérie, Air Mauritius, China Eastern, Shanghaï Airlines as well as with the Algerian Armed Forces. Between them they have 25,000 hours of flight training experience. 

All are members of the French Aviation Authorities (DGAC) examination board and are qualified to train in English.

This young yet mature team has a wide range of skills and un unfailing determination to succeed. Together they form a close knit, and readily available dynamic group. 

They are at your service to provide the best standards of JAA & EASA training in French or English. They will pass on the technical and personal skills required for a future airline pilot with a high degree of globally recognized professionalism.

EPAG NG is an EASA Approved Training Organisation, reference : FR.ATO.0059

Name: Leadership In Flight Training Academy
Description:
Leadership In Flight Training (LIFT) Academy is a U.S.-based commercial aviation pilot training school owned by Republic Airways Holdings Inc.

Headquartered in Indianapolis, LIFT provides commercial aviation training by utilizing a curriculum that combines flight, flight simulator, and online and in-classroom training. LIFT Academy students train on a fleet of aircraft produced by Diamond Aircraft Industries, including the DA40 single-engine, DA42 twin-engine, and DA20 single-engine aircraft. Complementing this, LIFT has deployed Aviation Advanced Training Devices (AATDs) from Diamond Simulation and Frasca International. LIFT further enhances its training environment with immersive training devices (ITDs) crafted by Vertex Solutions, integrating the power of virtual reality into its curriculum.

LIFT offers its graduates a defined pathway to a career as a commercial pilot at Republic Airways. LIFT Academy has locations in Indianapolis, Indiana, Columbus, Indiana, Galveston, Texas, Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, and Tuskegee, Alabama.

To learn more about LIFT, visit www.flywithlift.com.

Name: HELISIM
Description: HELISIM, located on the Marseille-Provence International Airport in France, is a state-of-the-art Simulation Center using the most technologically advanced equipment. The Training Centre is the world's largest Eurocopter-approved centre certified Level D by JAA authorities and FAA have already established a reputation within the Simulation and Helicopter Industry.

Description:

Name: Drone Rangers India Private Limited
Description: We, at Drone Rangers a premier destination for comprehensive DGCA Approved drone training solutions. Dive into our expertise in drone operations, while exploring our top-tier agriculture drone sales and precision spraying services.  Join us in shaping the future of aerial technology!

Name: X-Aero Training Academy
Description:
SAF Aerogroup Training Division
Born from the union of SAF Training Academy and Azur helicopter training center, X-Aero Training Center is a pilot training dedicated company. 
French Alps, French riviera and la Reunion Island based, it offer training from PPL to advanded pilot training including IR ans operational training. It also operate two FFS (EC135T2+ and AS350B3+) in Albertville.

Name: International Aero Training Academy | IATAC
Description:
Asia's Best Flight Academy (755913-T) based in Melaka, Malaysia

Established over a decade ago, IATAC stands as a beacon of excellence in aviation training. 

With a steadfast commitment to providing the highest quality education, we take pride in offering top-notch facilities and a fleet of state-of-the-art training aircraft.

At IATAC, we believe in nurturing the next generation of pilots by providing a conducive learning environment that fosters both skill development and personal growth. 

Our team of experienced instructors is dedicated to ensuring that every student receives the guidance and support they need to excel in their aviation journey.

With an emphasis on safety, professionalism, and innovation, we strive to exceed industry standards and equip our students with the knowledge and skills required to navigate the skies with confidence.

Join us and embark on an exciting journey towards realising your aviation dreams. 

Let's soar to new heights together!

Name: FSDC - Aerosolutions
Description:
At FSDC Aerosolutions, we bring the skies to your fingertips with our state-of-the-art Full Motion Simulators and VR/XR Simulators.  Our simulators are designed with cutting-edge technology to provide pilots with an immersive, high-fidelity flying experience that mirrors the real world. Built to meet the highest standards of reliability, performance, and efficiency.

Name: Air Rescue Systems
Description:
Air Rescue Systems, A Vita Inclinata company, has a strong reputation for its custom and total team approach to serving customers in various branches of the military and emergency response organizations across the globe for more than 20 years. 

ARS offers custom, detail-oriented courses for advanced helicopter operations (such as Hoist, Short Haul, Rappel, Fast Rope, Medical/Rescue, Precision Long Line & Skid Operations) for multiple operation types and locations. Depending on flight skills or rescue techniques needed, courses are tailored to mission-specific requirements. 

The equipment is purpose designed and built by working helicopter operations professionals utilizing real-world experience and the latest in industry technologies. The US Army, Navy, and Marines granted Air Worthiness Approvals for the Air Rescue Vest – Quick Connect along with maintaining several additional technical approvals for other product categories.

Name: DCA Expertises
Description:
DCA Expertises est une agence Mauritanienne spécialisée en Intelligence Artificielle, proposant des services de formation, Conseil, Assistance, sous-traitance et solutions IA sur mesure. 

Notre mission : mettre l’Intelligence Artificielle au service de la performance, de la transformation et de la souveraineté numérique.

Name: ALGERIE AERO ACADEMY
Description:
Agrée par la Direction de l’Aéronautique et Météorologie, Ministère des Transports sous la référence N° SDA/13/2023.
ALGERIE AERO ACADEMY est une institution d'excellence dédiée à la formation aéronautique en Algérie. Nous sommes fiers de former la nouvelle génération de professionnels de l'aviation, en offrant des programmes de formation de qualité et en mettant l'accent sur la pratique et l'expérience concrète. Soyez assuré(e) de recevoir une formation de premier ordre pour une carrière réussie dans l'industrie aéronautique.

ALGERIE AERO ACADEMY menée par des professionnels de l’aérien dans la discipline, la rigueur et une sérénité absolue, s’engage et met tous ses efforts, son savoir et savoir faire pour garantir des formations de qualité.
A ce titre on vous propose les formations suivantes:
- Pilote privé hélicoptère (PPLH).
- Pilote professionnel hélicoptère (CPLH).
- Aide mécanicien.
- Agent de manutention.
- Agent d’escale.
-  Bagagiste.
Autres formations en cours de validation.

Pour plus d information contactez-nous par mail.

mail: contact@algerieaeroacademy.com

Name: DataTalentsPro
Description:
DataTalentsPro : L'E-learning au service de la transformation numérique dans la finance et la comptabilité.

Chez DataTalentsPro, nous offrons des formations pratiques et accessibles pour accompagner les professionnels dans leur reconversion ou leur montée en compétences, en particulier dans l'hybridation des compétences financières et technologiques. Nous formons des profils IT-Finance capables de répondre aux défis d'un secteur en pleine transformation numérique.

Nos parcours sont flexibles et conçus pour permettre aux professionnels d’acquérir des compétences directement applicables dans leur quotidien, comme la gestion des données financières, l'analyse et la visualisation des données, et l'intégration des technologies dans les processus financiers.

Public cible :
Nous adressons les comptables, analystes financiers, DAF, ainsi que les professionnels en reconversion. Nous proposons également des formations aux entreprises qui souhaitent renforcer les compétences numériques de leurs équipes financières.

Résultats concrets :
À l’issue de nos formations, les apprenants sont prêts à occuper des rôles hybrides, combinant expertise financière et compétences numériques, et à transformer les processus financiers de leurs organisations.

Pourquoi choisir DataTalentsPro ?

Flexibilité et accessibilité : formations à distance et adaptées à tous les niveaux.

Compétences pratiques : compétences immédiatement applicables dans un environnement professionnel.

Accompagnement personnalisé : coaching pour résoudre des problématiques concrètes.

Rejoignez-nous et transformez votre parcours professionnel dans la finance digitale !

Name: TrainingAir
Description:
TrainingAir is an EASA Approved Training Organisation, run by pilots for pilots. We specialise in Type Ratings, Licence Renewal & Revalidation and Instructor courses for the Airbus A320, A330, A340 and Boeing 737 NG.

Contact us or visit our website to learn more.

Name: Horizon Swiss Flight Academy Ltd.
Description:
Horizon Swiss Flight Academy is the premier provider of professional pilot training in Switzerland. Since 1979, we have been dedicated to helping individuals achieve their dreams of becoming airline pilots. Our comprehensive program offers a wide range of courses for both individuals and operators.

As a proud EASA PART 147 Maintenance Training Organization, we specialize in EMBRAER aircrafts and provide tailored maintenance training to fully meet the technical or operator's needs.

At Horizon SFA, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop-shop for all your aviation training needs. From flight academy to technical and operating training, we strive to provide the highest level of training in line with Swiss quality and EASA regulations. Trust us to be your competent partner in achieving your aviation goals. #FlightSchool #PilotTraining #AviationCareer #EASA #EMBRAER

Name: One Sky Academy
Description:
Chez One Sky, nous formons les pilotes de demain avec passion et expertise. 

Fondée par des professionnels de l’aviation, notre école, située dans le sud-ouest de la France, est le tremplin idéal pour ceux qui rêvent de faire carrière dans le ciel. 

Que vous souhaitiez devenir pilote de ligne, professionnel du transport aérien, ou simplement explorer les airs, notre équipe vous accompagne à chaque étape de votre parcours.

Name: Companhia das Asas
Description:
A Companhia das Asas possui certificado de autorização para funcionamento como Centro de Instrução de Aviação Civil (CIAC), isso significa que a Agência Nacional de Aviação, a ANAC, atesta que nossa instituição está certificada para promover a formação de pessoal que queira trabalhar na aviação civil. Diante disso, nosso principal objetivo é oferecer cursos e treinamentos com alto nível de qualidade.

Nossos cursos:
- Piloto privado e comercial de helicóptero
- Piloto privado e comercial de avião
- Comissário de Voo
- Despachante Operacional de Voo (DOV)
- Mecânico de Manutenção Aeronáutico (MMA) nas especialidades Célula, Grupo Motopropulsor e Aviônico;
- Agente de Aeroporto;
- Artigos Perigosos Categorias 08, 09, 10 e 11;

Missão
"Incentivar alunos por meio de um ensino humano e de qualidade, a transpor fronteiras e conquistar suas “próprias asas”.

Name: FlyBound Training
Description:
At FlyBound, we're not just another flight training program – we're a gateway to your aviation dreams. Our innovative approach combines the advantages of dual training and the best of both modular and integrated training methods, ensuring that aspiring pilots benefit from a comprehensive and tailored education.

As an alliance of industry-leading flight schools – including Naples Air Center, Bristol Ground School, and IAT International Aviation Training – FlyBound is committed to delivering excellence in every aspect of your training journey. Our program is specifically tailored to meet EASA's requirements while training in the US, maximizing your future job opportunities worldwide. Plus, all training is delivered in English, ensuring that as long as you can speak and understand English, you can adapt our course and your license will be issued by the strongest aviation authorities in the world.

With FlyBound, you'll not only receive top-tier training but also enjoy more flight hours, more licenses and ratings, and ongoing support to help you land your dream job with an airline. Our dedicated Career department will support you every step of the way to ensure your success.

But FlyBound offers more than just flight training. Our program provides an enriching cultural experience, immersing you in the unique atmospheres of both the US and Europe. By training in these diverse environments, you'll not only improve your language skills, essential in aviation, but also gain a cultural experience that will be unforgettable for the rest of your life.

And that's not all – our training advisors and assessment department will provide you with valuable information and offer you the opportunity to attend one of our assessment sessions completely free of charge.

Don't let your aviation dreams remain grounded – contact us today to learn more about how FlyBound can help you take flight!

Name: Delta Professional Services
Description:
Delta Professional Services (DPS) is a wholly owned subsidiary of Delta Air Lines and the premier flight training & standards company. We are the primary provider for supplemental Flight Simulator instructors to air carriers and manufacturers throughout the world serving as a strategic partner for major airlines for 20+ years. We offer expert training from exceptional pilots.

At DPS, we don’t just meet the standard—we raise it. Whether you’re charting the next phase of your aviation career or looking to enhance your company’s pilot training programs, we’re here to support your journey.

Name: Swan Fly Estonia
Description: Welcome to the world of Swan Fly Estonia – the new generation of Aviation Training. Our Approved Training Organization offers unparalleled safety standards to pilots from private customers to international airlines. We've been proudly providing top-notch training according EASA regulations since 2015. We aim big: By 2025, our training technology and methodology are set to become a leading example in Europe.

Name: Canal Proa Certa
Description: Bem-vindo à página do Canal Proa Certa no LinkedIn - o destino para todos os apaixonados pela aviação! Como voluntários, pilotos e entusiastas dedicados, nossa comunidade está empenhada em compartilhar conhecimento aeronáutico, fomentar discussões relevantes, oferecer cobertura exclusiva de eventos e realizar entrevistas no mundo da aviação. Junte-se a nós nesta jornada emocionante de aprendizado e descoberta, onde cada conexão é uma oportunidade para expandir horizontes e voar mais alto. Siga nossa página para ficar por dentro das últimas novidades, insights e histórias inspiradoras do Canal Proa Certa - porque na aviação, o céu não é o limite e nós estamos prontos para decolar juntos com você!

Name: Fly Provence
Description:
Fly Provence est une école de pilotage située à Aix-en-Provence.

Nous formons des pilotes de ligne, d’instructeurs et des passionnés d’aviation, dans un cadre exigeant, avec un accompagnement individualisé.

Notre catalogue comprend l’ensemble des formations : PPL, CPL, ATPL théorique, IR, MEP, QVN, MCC. Nous utilisons une flotte mixte, incluant des avions 100 % électriques Pipistrel Velis Electro, rechargés via une station solaire installée sur notre aérodrome.

Notre pédagogie repose sur l’expérience de professionnels issus de l’aviation civile et militaire, et sur des outils de simulation de dernière génération.

Fly Provence s’inscrit dans une dynamique d’innovation sobre, en lien avec les évolutions du secteur aérien.

...

Fly Provence is a flight school based in Aix-en-Provence, France.

We train airline pilots, instructors, and aviation enthusiasts through a rigorous, personalized approach.

Our programs cover the full range of certifications: PPL, CPL, ATPL theory, IR, MEP, QVN, and MCC.

The fleet includes both conventional aircraft and fully electric Pipistrel Velis Electro models, powered by an on-site solar station.

Our instructors come from both civilian and military aviation backgrounds, and our training incorporates state-of-the-art flight simulation tools.

Fly Provence is part of a new chapter in aviation – one that combines technical excellence and environmental awareness.

Name: Dronexperts
Description:
Welcome to Dronexperts – a leading center for training, operations, and consulting in professional drone services.
We train drone pilots in European scenarios (Open: A1/A2/A3 – Specific: STS01/STS02) as well as in advanced specializations such as photogrammetry, thermal imaging, and construction site monitoring.
Our certified training programs are eligible for CPF funding and delivered by a Qualiopi-accredited organization.
We also provide tailored field operations and offer full regulatory support (SORA, operations manual, operational authorizations).
 Based in Paris and Bordeaux, we operate throughout France and internationally.

Name: HMotion
Description:
HMotion provides flight simulator training for Airbus Helicopters‘ light twin-engine helicopters, the EC135, EC145, H135 and H145, as well as a wide range of cost-effective training courses for helicopter personnel, including mission and critical flight training.

The Best of Both Worlds
HMotion is a joint venture between Airbus Helicopters and the ADAC HEMS Academy, combining the best of two worlds: Airbus’ engineering knowledge and aircraft data as the helicopter manufacturer, with the operational expertise of ADAC Luftrettung – one of the world’s leading helicopter emergency medical service providers.

Our mission:
- Provide our customers with high quality training solutions to ensure continuous fleet availability 
- Enhance safety in flight operations by conducting training and critical flight situations on state of the art and fully certified simulators under the supervision of highly experienced instructors.

 Based in Gilching, Germany – serving international operators

Name: Orient Flights
Description:
Think of an Airplane, a rigid piece of metal structure that can fly faster and higher than a bird. A visionary human innovation that made possible for a human being fly like a bird.

Welcome to our premises at Orient Flights Aviation Academy (OFAA), Mysore. OFAA, Mysore is a pilot training establishment of Orient Flights Private Limited. Aviation studies a grandeur of academic metamorphosis can now be acquired by the mighty spirited future fliers; who wants to make their dream a happening, with help from the extraordinary professionals whom they possess in their healthy Orient Flight School family. “Orient Flights is proud to introduce the latest in-flight training technology with the modern fleet of aircraft.

Orient Flights has one of the best fleets of training aircraft at Mysore. We are proud to introduce the latest in-flight and off-flight training technologies for student pilots undergoing training.

Name: AirSkill
Description:
AirSkill is the best training tool for professional drone pilots. 

It uniquely combines virtual reality and a real drone controller with industry-specific training scenarios in a simple and budget-friendly package. 

Fits into a compact case and works as a standalone system, no PC required.

This elevates the safety, quality, and efficiency of pilot training compared to practicing only with real drones.

Professional aviators have used simulators for decades as a crucial part of pilot training. With AirSkill, drone pilots can also finally practice with an advanced simulator.

Name: La Fresque de l'Engagement local
Description:
La Fresque de l'Engagement local est un outil ludique, pédagogique et de référence, permettant de s'approprier les enjeux du développement local, pour son territoire, acteur de la transition. 
 
Elle permet ainsi à chacune et chacun de découvrir et d'appréhender les valeurs, les acteurs et les méthodes du développement local.
 
Inspirée de la Fresque du Climat , elle se construit en équipe, au cours d'un atelier collectif de trois heures, associant l’animateur (le fresqueur) au collectif (les engagés) venant de tout horizon, réunis autour d'une volonté commune : agir en faveur de leur territoire, en appréhendant son écosystème, pour en être un acteur engagé.
 
Cet outil est utilisable et utilisé comme support d'apprentissage, d'animation ou de co-construction d'un projet de territoire ou d'une stratégie locale de développement. Il s'adresse à tout public engagé dans la vie publique locale :  élus et collectivités, acteurs institutionnels et privés, collectifs de citoyens ou acteurs associatifs, assemblées de sociétaires, conseils de développement ou de quartier…
 
La Fresque de l'Engagement local est un outil :
- de sensibilisation aux enjeux de l’engagement et du développement local
- d’appropriation de concepts perçus comme complexes 
- de vulgarisation de notions essentielles à l’action publique locale
- d’observation, volontairement évolutif, des bonnes pratiques locales

Name: Aeroclube de Juiz de fora
Description:
O Aeroclube de Juiz de Fora é uma das mais tradicionais escolas de aviação civil do Brasil, com mais de oito décadas dedicadas à formação de profissionais altamente qualificados para o setor aéreo. Reconhecido pela excelência técnica e pela cultura de segurança, o Aeroclube forma pilotos e mecânicos que hoje atuam em companhias aéreas, empresas executivas e instituições aeronáuticas em todo o país.

Com sede no Aeroporto da Serrinha (SBJF), o Aeroclube oferece uma estrutura completa de ensino, frota moderna e corpo docente formado por instrutores experientes e atuantes no mercado. Nosso propósito é transformar o sonho de voar em uma carreira sólida e financeiramente planejada.

O Plano de Formação do Aeroclube de Juiz de Fora é o mais completo do Brasil: conduz o aluno do zero ao cockpit em quatro anos, unindo a graduação em Ciências Aeronáuticas a todas as licenças e habilitações (PP, PC, MLTE, IFR e INVA). A jornada inclui até 500 horas de voo e vivência prática com frota de aeronaves diversa e robusta, dentro de um programa de treinamento padronizado e homologado pela ANAC.

Além da formação de pilotos, o Aeroclube oferece o Curso de Mecânico de Manutenção de Aeronaves (MMA), com três habilitações (Célula, GMP e Aviônicos), parte teórica online e prática presencial em oficina homologada, proporcionando acesso direto ao mercado de trabalho.

Mais do que uma escola, somos um ecossistema aeronáutico ativo, que conecta alunos, instrutores, empresas e instituições do setor, inspirando novas gerações a voar mais alto, com propósito, disciplina e paixão pela aviação.

 Aeroclube de Juiz de Fora: Tradição que forma o futuro da aviação brasileira.

Name: Flight Level One
Description:
Here’s a professional, mission-driven LinkedIn Company Overview for Flight Level One. It’s tailored to resonate with aviation professionals, CFIs, insurers, safety experts, and flight schools — while remaining brand-forward and not personally tied to you.

⸻

 Flight Level One – LinkedIn Company Overview

Overview:
Flight Level One is an aviation safety and pilot proficiency platform that transforms how general aviation pilots understand risk, maintain currency, and build real-world proficiency.

Using smart data analysis and AI-driven training recommendations, FL1 provides pilots with a dynamic flight safety dashboard, logbook-powered insights, and personalized flight tasks that align with FAA guidance, NTSB insights, and real-world pilot behavior. Whether you’re VFR-only or an experienced IFR pilot, FL1 helps you fly smarter, sharper, and safer.

⸻

Our Mission:
To make general aviation safer, more intentional, and more rewarding by helping pilots fly with confidence, backed by data, structure, and purpose.

⸻

What We Do:
 Analyze digital logbook data (ForeFlight and others)
 Generate personalized risk assessments
 Assign smart training tasks based on recency, aircraft, and flight trends
 Track crosswind exposure and flight currency
 Alert pilots to upcoming lapses in Day/Night/IFR readiness
 Support CFIs with structured progress tracking for their students

⸻

Who We Help:
	•	Private pilots and weekend flyers
	•	Aircraft owners and renters
	•	Certified Flight Instructors (CFIs)
	•	Type clubs and flight schools
	•	Insurance brokers seeking risk reduction tools

⸻

Flight Level One is…
	•	Built by pilots
	•	Powered by AI
	•	Backed by real flying experience
	•	Designed for proficiency, not just compliance

⸻

 Learn more: www.flightlevelone.io
 For partnerships or CFI programs: crew@flightlevelone.io

⸻

Name: Hammerheads Aerobatics
Description:
Hello. My name is Chris and I’m an airplane nerd. Ok, now that I’ve gotten that out of the way, a little bit about me. Ever since I experienced my first aerobatic ride in the back seat of a T-6 Texan as a teenager, I've been hooked on aerobatics. In 2008, I earned my pilot's license and quickly followed that up with a tailwheel endorsement. From there, I moved on to basic aerobatic training in Citabrias and Decathlons.

In 2016, I achieved my dream of flying a Pitts Special and love to fly the Pitts in regional aerobatic contests on the east coast. Flying these amazing airplanes upside down has become one of my greatest passions.

I have a commercial pilot's license with instrument rating and became a flight instructor in August of 2022. Also, I am a licensed aircraft mechanic. Helping others discover the thrill of flying is a truly rewarding experience for me.

If you're ready to take to the skies and experience the thrill of aerobatics, let's go flying!

Name: SkyTrek Aviation
Description:
SkyTrek Aviation is a premier flight training and aircraft rental provider based at Space Coast Regional Airport (KTIX) in Titusville, Florida. We specialize in personalized instruction, and safety-first operations for aspiring and experienced pilots across Central Florida. We provide flexible, personalized instruction for fixed-wing: Private Pilot License (PPL), Instrument Rating (IR), Commercial Pilot License (CPL), Certified Flight Instructor (CFI), Certified Flight Instructor Instrument (CFII), Multiengine Instructor (MEI), Airline Transport Pilot (ATP), Flight Reviews, Instrument Proficiency Check (IPC), and Custom training programs tailored to your goals

Whether you're pursuing your first certificate or advancing toward a professional aviation career, SkyTrek offers a streamlined, supportive path to success. Our team is passionate about building confident, competent aviators through hands-on training, well-maintained equipment, and a welcoming learning environment.

Name: Aventura en Madrid
Description:
Divulgación del vuelo sin motor en la zona norte de la sierra del Guadarrama. Entre ciudades monumentales como Segovia y Ávila, a 1 hora de Madrid.
Con paisajes increíbles desde un punto de vista que poca gente ha tenido la suerte ver.
Volamos con águilas y buitres como ellos, con el motor más ecológico, aprovechando la energía que el sol aporta a la atmósfera.
Bailamos con las nubes y por encima de ellas cuando la meteorología lo permite.
Hacemos vídeos de 360 grados y regalamos las gafas de RV para verlos en casa.
Damos vuelos en pareja, en dos veleros en paralelo para veros y saludaros.
Piloto por un día, incluye clase de pilotaje y acrobacia en simulador de Realidad Virtual, vídeos en 360 grados para instrucción y vuelos memorables, y 30 minutos de vuelo real como "piloto al mando".
Organizamos eventos de empresa, nos adaptamos a cualquier requerimiento, transporte, catering y cambiamos de aeródromo si es necesario.

Name: Mon BIA
Description:
Mon BIA est une plateforme de préparation au Brevet d'Initiation Aéronautique (BIA).
Mon BIA propose de nombreuses ressources digitales (cours, annales, articles, etc...) afin d'aider les candidats dans la préparation de leur examen.

Choisir Mon BIA, c'est opter pour le meilleur de la formation aéronautique !

Le BIA est un examen français qui atteste de culture générale dans le monde de l'aéronautique. C'est le premier examen théorique du domaine, qui permet aux jeunes (du collège, lycée et post-bac) de découvrir en profondeur le monde de l'aviation.

De la culture aéronautique et spatial, en passant par l'étude météorologique, l'aérodynamisme, la navigation et la règlementation, le BIA vous offre une variété de connaissances et méthodes du monde des avions !

Name: IFR Flight Simulator
Description:
Get Confident in IFR Flying - Holdings & Intercepts - Screening Preparation


Trusted by thousands of IFR pilots worldwide, IFR Flight Simulator is your ultimate mobile companion for realistic, effective, and convenient IFR training. Master essential IFR procedures anytime, anywhere—perfect for student pilots aiming to gain confidence or experienced pilots keeping their skills sharp.


Why Pilots Love IFR Flight Simulator:


• Realistic IFR Training: Experience authentic IFR procedures directly from your smartphone, no complex setups needed.

• Confidence & Convenience: Train holdings, intercepts, and IFR approaches on the go.

• Real-time Simulation: Fly procedures with realistic physics and instrumentation, featuring the Primary Flight Display (PFD) and Navigation Display (ND).


Key Features:


Worldwide Navigation Database:

• 5000+ Airports globally available for your IFR training.

• Over 11,000 VORs, NDBs, and navigational aids for extensive practice.


Comprehensive Training Modes:

• Holding Trainer: Practice randomized holdings, calculate entries, and wind correction angles.

• Intercept Trainer: Master inbound and outbound radial and QDM/QDR intercepts, sharpening your navigation precision.


Real-Time Flight Simulator:

• Integrated autopilot for precise training, or fly manually by tilting your device for hands-on experience.

• Fast-forward mode to efficiently review or retry procedures.

• Replay and analyze your flight path with clear map visuals to reinforce learning.

• Live Map: See your flight path in real-time on the map as you fly, enhancing situational awareness.


Effective Skill Building:

• Quickly calculate mental IFR math without pen and paper.

• Perfectly suited for simulator screenings, flight training, and interview preparations.


User Reviews:


• "An incredible training tool for practicing holds, VOR bearings, and headings. Didn't think such high-quality training was possible on an app!"


• "Perfect to make IFR calculations a refl

Name: Pilot Launch
Description:
At Pilot Launch, we are committed to making the dreams of aspiring pilots in the Asia Pacific region a reality. Founded by a passionate Private Pilot, our mission is to empower individuals to take to the skies and achieve their aviation aspirations. With firsthand experience in the challenges of flight training, our founder understands the complexities involved in navigating the path to becoming a licensed pilot.

We specialise in connecting students with the best and most affordable flight schools across various locations. Our comprehensive support ensures that every aspect of your journey is seamless and stress-free. From the initial application process and visa arrangements to medical assessments and ground school, we take care of all the details. Our dedicated team will guide you through flight training, assist with the issuance of licenses, and provide support for any necessary conversions.

At Pilot Launch, we believe that becoming a pilot is within reach for everyone, and we strive to remove barriers so that you can focus on what matters most: our training and passion for flying. Let us help you turn your dreams of flight into reality, as we handle everything behind the scenes to make your experience smooth and enjoyable. 

Our headquarters are strategically located in Hong Kong and Singapore, both renowned for their world-class aviation infrastructure and vibrant flying communities. These hubs serve as the ideal launching pad for your flight training journey, offering access to modern air traffic control systems and multiple airports. In Hong Kong, students benefit from exposure to busy airspace, enhancing their communication skills and operational procedures, while Singapore's efficient aviation sector ensures superior training standards

We proudly extend our reach to several key locations for flight training, including Bangkok, Zhuhai, Manila, and Islamabad. Each of these cities offers unique advantages for aspiring pilots.

Name: Best Coast Aviation
Description:
At Best Coast Aviation, flight instruction is at the heart of what we do.
Our tailored approach is designed to create an instruction plan customized for your specific goals. 

This period of learning and continual growth is the most important aspect of every budding pilot's career. Building a strong foundation in risk management, aeronautical decision making, safety and a deep understanding of the challenges and demands of pilots today will set the stage for a safe and rewarding career in aviation, whether it be personal or professional. 

Your goals become our goals - we're here to develop a tailored plan to get you there. Each individual's life experience, innate talents and learning techniques are unique to him/her, and your flight instruction should reflect that. Our systematic approach to providing excellent flight instruction coupled with our commitment to fostering your individual growth as a pilot and honing in on how you learn best is what ultimately makes all the difference.

We're here to accelerate your learning and support your aviation journey every step of the way. Let's get you flying.

Name: Ace Simulations LLC
Description: Ace Simulations was founded in 2022 to provide low-cost flight simulator build plans. The design of our sims began in 2019, with the Mark III variation being completed in 2022. Our mission is to bring more people into the flight simulation hobby. However, with high-cost hardware, this can be a challenge. All of our sims are designed in-house with a focus on making them as simple, cost-effective, and DIY-friendly as possible. Today we are redefining flight simulation by creating custom simulators built from real aircraft components. These simulators provide an incredible degree of immersion and can be used for training, or just for fun.

Name: Mach 1 Aviation Van Nuys
Description:
One of the most defining characteristics of training at Mach 1, the leading Van Nuys flight training center, is the expertise and care in instruction our pilots provide. We’re tired of seeing pilots receive sub-par training. We’re tired of seeing pilots who don’t really know the basics. We’re tired of seeing pilots lose their lives because those that trained them didn’t care. We care and it shows.

Since 2007, Mach 1 Aviation has created pilots who are safe, proficient and share a common love of flying. As we’ve evolved as a flight school, one thing has remained top priority – the quality of the instruction we offer. We ensure that every aviator who comes through our doors leaves as the safest and most capable version of themselves. And to this day we continue to provide the newest and most technologically advanced general aviation aircraft on the market along with industry-leading expert and caring instruction.

Every lesson, ground, sim, or flight, is driven by one goal – a deep understanding and mastery. No one earns a certificate at Mach 1 without truly deserving it. And frankly, we believe that there’s no other alternative

Description:
Aqui está uma sugestão de descrição para a seção "Sobre" (About) do LinkedIn da NAV Treinamentos, otimizada para SEO e com um tom profissional:

Título (Headline da Página): NAV Treinamentos | Escola de Aviação Homologada ANAC no Nordeste

Descrição (Seção Sobre):

Transforme seu sonho de voar em uma carreira de sucesso. A NAV Treinamentos é a escola de aviação referência no Nordeste, dedicada há mais de 20 anos a formar profissionais de excelência para o mercado da aviação civil.

Somos homologados pela ANAC, garantindo os mais altos padrões de qualidade e segurança em todos os nossos cursos.

Nossas Formações Principais:

 Curso de Comissário de Voo (CMS): Prepare-se para garantir a segurança, o conforto e a tranquilidade em voos nacionais e internacionais.

 Curso de Piloto Privado de Avião (PPA): O primeiro passo fundamental para quem deseja pilotar por hobby ou seguir carreira.

 Curso de Piloto Comercial de Avião (PCA): A formação avançada que qualifica você para atuar profissionalmente no transporte aéreo.

Com uma infraestrutura moderna e instrutores altamente experientes, nossa missão é fornecer o conhecimento técnico e prático necessário para que você decole na sua carreira.

Se você busca uma formação sólida para ser Comissário(a) de Voo ou Piloto de Avião, sua jornada começa aqui.

Pronto para decolar? Visite nosso site para conhecer os detalhes dos cursos e agendar uma visita.

Grâce à des graphismes de pointe et des commandes authentiques, notre simulateur offre une expérience immersive, idéale pour les passionnés d’aviation en herbe et les amateurs de sensations fortes. Prêt à décoller vers de nouvelles altitudes de réalisme?

Name: Pegasus Flight School
Description: We are a part 61 flight school based in Waco, Tx!

Name: GLOBAL DRONE CENTER
Description: Global Drone Center est une entreprise spécialisée dans la vente, l'immatriculation, la maintenance et la formation en télépilotage drone.

Name: Union Flight LLC
Description:
We provide part 61 style flight training covering all certificates up through CFII. These include
- Private Pilot; Instrument Rating; Commercial Pilot; Certified Flight Instructor; & Certified Flight Instructor Instrument add-on.

Union Flight LLC also provides High Performance endorsements, local discovery flights at competitive rates, Grand Canyon SFRA training flights, and proficiency flight training in and out of Sedona municipal airport!

In addition to flight training, we also provide aircraft ferry/relocation services anywhere in the United States excluding all US territories & Hawaii. 

To request services, simply go to Unionflightschool.com, submit your inquiry and expect a call or email within 8 hours!

Name: DriveXpérience École de conduite & Pilotage Automobile
Description:
DriveXpérience est une école de conduite nouvelle génération située à Besançon, conçue pour accompagner chaque élève vers une conduite responsable, autonome et confiante.

Notre mission : transmettre bien plus que les bases du permis B. Nous formons des conducteurs capables d’anticiper, de s’adapter et de maîtriser leur véhicule dans toutes les situations.

Nos formations :
• Permis B  : formation personnalisée avec suivi théorique et pratique, rythme adapté à chaque élève.
• Conduite Accompagnée (AAC) : dès 15 ans, une expérience progressive et encadrée.
• Prévention : ateliers pratiques et sensibilisation aux risques routiers (entreprises, particuliers).
• Eco-conduite : formation à l’éco-conduite pour réduire consommation, stress et impact environnemental.
• eDriveXpérience & HybridAutoDriveXpérience : prise en main et optimisation de la conduite sur véhicules électriques et hybrides.
• Formation ADAS : comprendre et maîtriser les aides à la conduite (freinage automatique, maintien dans la voie, etc.).
• Perfectionnement au pilotage : stages de pilotage sur circuit, coaching personnalisé, pour débutants ou pilotes confirmés avec pilote instructeur diplômé d'état. 

Notre pédagogie repose sur l'écoute, la rigueur, l’innovation, et une expérience terrain forte. Nous utilisons des outils modernes (simulateur de conduite, analyse vidéo, plateforme en ligne pour le code) pour accompagner chaque élève vers la réussite.

Rejoignez-nous pour une formation qui va bien au-delà du simple permis de conduire.

Name: Adventure Air Flight School
Description: Adventure Air is a flight school for the next generation. We utilize Light Sport Aircraft with advanced instruments and safety features. We provide flight training  for Sport, Private, Instrument, CFI, CFII, and conduct flight reviews.

Name: knowledgehub
Description: KnowledgeHub est une plateforme innovante dédiée à fournir des formations en ligne de haute qualité dans divers domaines. Notre mission est de rendre l'apprentissage accessible et abordable pour tous, en particulier pour les étudiants et les professionnels au Maroc.

Name: FlySmart Training
Description: FlySmart by Hummingbird Drones is Canada’s leading training course for hobbyist & professional drone users. At FlySmart, our commitment is to you, the pilot.  From your first questions about drones, to becoming a professional pilot & flight reviewer, we offer continued support & education for safe drone operations. Training with FlySmart means you are joining a community of pilots & a team of professionals whose mission is to bring you to the sky & the potential of drones under your wings.

Name: Hill Country Heli's
Description:
Established in 2024, Hill Country Heli’s is dedicated to providing premier helicopter services for discerning aviation enthusiasts. Located at the prestigious Horseshoe Bay Resort Jet Center, we offer exclusive flight training, breathtaking tours, and luxury helicopter rentals using state-of-the-art Robinson R-44 helicopters.

Our highly experienced instructors are committed to delivering exceptional training, ensuring safety, and fostering a passion for flying. We pride ourselves on our personalized service, flexible scheduling, and attention to detail.

Horseshoe Bay, Texas, known for its stunning landscapes and vibrant community, provides the perfect backdrop for our aerial adventures. This serene and upscale region attracts those seeking both relaxation and excitement, making it an ideal location for hobby flying.

At Hill Country Heli’s, our mission is to create unforgettable experiences, whether you’re aspiring to become a licensed pilot or looking for a unique way to explore the beauty of Texas Hill Country from the skies. Join us and elevate your passion for flying.

Visit our website today and contact us for information on Training, Tours, Rentals, and more!

Name: Propel Aviation Center LLC
Description: Flight School-Learn to Fly Like a Pro!

Name: Elite Support Americas
Description:
In the global aviation industry, there is a problem- a worldwide pilot shortage.  This affects commercial airlines, charter companies, and even the air forces of the US and allies.  They need pilots - and they need instructors to train new pilots.  Elite Support Americas (ESA) provides Live-Flying Contract Instructor Pilots to the US Government organizations that serve their mission and Partners.  Our workforce augments training staffs to help fill gaps in instructor pilot staffing, train pilots, and meet personnel resource needs. The service we provide allows customers to achieve pilot training goals - on time.   
     ESA is an innovative and disruptive (in a good way!) company in a market in which the customer is experiencing real pain: being short on pilots, with little capacity to move the needle in a positive direction. In the US armed services alone, they are short thousands of pilots.  ESA can help.
     Instructor experience is extremely valuable to you - and it is difficult to create without help.  We help you retain talent.  ESA's Instructor Pilots have experience from multi-national training centers and are ready to begin supporting your new training contract today.  Getting much-needed training is achievable.  ESA can help.

Name: AINautics
Description:
Welcome to AINautics Drone Training Academy, where innovation meets the skies! At AINautics, we are a premier institution at the forefront of unmanned aerial systems education, dedicated to shaping the future of drone technology. Our academy is committed to providing comprehensive and cutting-edge training programs that empower enthusiasts, professionals, and businesses to harness the full potential of drone technology.
Whether you're a novice seeking to explore the skies or a seasoned pilot aiming to enhance your skills, AINautics Drone Training Academy is your gateway to a soaring future in the world of autonomous flight. Our programs are designed to equip you with the knowledge and skills necessary to navigate the skies safely and efficiently.
With our experienced instructors and state-of-the-art facilities, we offer hands-on training that covers a wide range of topics, including flight principles, regulations, aerial photography and videography, data analysis, and mission planning. We also provide specialized training for specific industries such as agriculture, construction, surveying, and more.
Join us as we navigate the horizon of possibilities and redefine the way we interact with the aerial frontier. Together, let's embrace the exciting opportunities that drone technology brings and shape the future of autonomous flight. Come and experience the thrill of flying with AINautics Drone Training Academy.

Name: Fly Perkasa
Description: Perkasa Flight School, di bawah naungan PT MITRA AVIASI PERKASA, merupakan salah satu sekolah pilot internasional terbesar di Indonesia dengan sertifikat pilot PSC - 141 - 017, dan berfokus untuk mempersiapkan siswa pilot yang siap untuk mengambil peran sebagai pilot komersial. Didirikan pada bulan Juli 2013, Perkasa Flight School telah disetujui oleh Otoritas Penerbangan Sipil Vietnam dan Republik Demokratik Rakyat Laos. Setiap siswa dilatih untuk menjadi pilot yang handal oleh instruktur yang berpengalaman, fasilitas terbaik dan pesawat yang paling handal. Perkasa Flight School memiliki basis pelatihan yang ideal yang berlokasi di Bandara Tunggul Wulung - Cilacap dan Bandara Nusawiru - Pangandaran, yang mengakomodasi pelatihan darat dan penerbangan.

Name: Aviatech FAPS - Potchefstroom
Description:
Welcome to the Highveld's Aviation Paradise

Nestled in the heart of South Africa's Highveld, Aviatech Flight Academy Potchefstroom (FAPS) is a hidden gem for aviation enthusiasts. Blessed with over 300 days of sunshine annually, this region offers the perfect weather conditions for flying. Whether it's the dry summers or the mild winters, pilots at Aviatech can enjoy consistent and predictable flying schedules, accelerating their journey to becoming seasoned aviators.

Global Recognition at Your Fingertips

As a member and Council state of the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO), South Africa prides itself on its robust and internationally accredited aviation infrastructure. This global standing means that a South African Civil Aviation Authority (SACAA) license obtained at Aviatech can be seamlessly converted to any other country's license of your choice. It’s not just a license; it's a gateway to the world.

Scenic Flights and Pilot Training: Sky's the Limit

Aviatech isn't just about professional training. Imagine soaring over the picturesque Potchefstroom with your partner on a scenic flight, experiencing the beauty of the landscape from a bird's eye view. And for those bitten by the flying bug, Aviatech is more than ready to transform you from an enthusiast to a certified pilot.

A Decade of Excellence in Aviation

With a track record spanning over a decade, Aviatech has cemented its position as a leader in the aviation industry. Catering to both local and international students, the academy offers a range of programs - from Sport Pilot to Airline Transport Pilot. 

Courses Tailored for Aspiring Pilots

Private Pilot License (PPL)
PPL to Commercial Pilot License
National Pilot License
Touring Motor Glider License (TMG)
Night/Instrument/Multi-Engine Rating

At Aviatech FAPS Flight Academy, your dream of flying isn't just a distant wish – it's a tangible reality waiting for you in the beautiful skies of Potchefstroom.

Name: Flight Code-X
Description: Flight Code-X is a revolutionary scenario builder for X-Plane 12 that enhances flight training with precision and fidelity. It offers an intuitive interface for creating custom flight scenarios tailored to individual training goals, such as weather conditions, challenging airspace, and emergency situations. The tool bridges the gap between simulation and reality, providing near-real-world experiences for continuous learning and skill enhancement. Designed for both amateur enthusiasts and professional pilots, Flight Code-X ensures reliable and repeatable simulation training, streamlining the setup process and investing in the future of aviation training.

Name: Flight School
Description: Flight School is a premier aviation training provider dedicated to transforming aspiring pilots into skilled, FAA-certified aviators. We offer comprehensive training programs, including Private Pilot License (PPL), Instrument Rating, Commercial Pilot License, and Certified Flight Instructor (CFI) courses, tailored to both recreational and career-focused students.

Name: Fliegerklub Carl Zeiss Jena e.V.
Description: Der Fliegerklub Jena wurde 1990 gegründet und ist seitdem auf dem Flugplatz Jena-Schöngleina zu Hause. Heute zählen wir mehr als 50 aktive Mitglieder im Alter von 14 bis über 70 Jahren. Von März bis Oktober können Mitglieder und Gäste des Vereins in unseren Segelflugzeugen den Himmel über Jena erobern. Interessierte aller Altersklassen können zudem in einer zwei- bis dreijährigen Ausbildung die Kunst des Segelflugs erlernen.

Name: Proteus Flight School
Description: At Proteus, our goal is to make your journey as a pilot fun, social, and safe, so you can focus on the enjoyment of flying. We provide comprehensive training for both aspiring professional pilots and those who simply want to fly recreationally.

Name: Aéroclub de l'ENAC Toulouse
Description:
Aéroclub de l'ENAC Toulouse FR.DTO.0641
Formation PPL(A) & LAPL(A).

Description:
O'Permis est un centre de formation aux permis bateau. L'encadrement est assuré par des moniteurs diplômés mettant leurs expériences au profit des candidats. 


L'objectif : Proposer des formations pour les différents permis plaisance à des tarifs abordables,

en s'adaptant à vos disponibilités et vos besoins.



Idéalement placé au bord de l'eau à Port-Cergy (95) et l’Isle-Adam (95), nous vous proposons des formules complètes (théorie et pratique) pour obtenir le permis bateau dès le premier passage à l'examen.

Name: 360 AviationLLC
Description: Our program's main goal is to provide career advancement opportunities for adults through practical and carefully crafted experiential training programs. Through engaging and hands-on educational opportunities, 360 Aviation, LLC continuously cultivates future industry leaders.

Name: AUSTRIAFLY GmbH
Description: Hoch hinaus mit der Flugschule Austriafly in Werfenweng: Paragleiter-Tandemflug ✓ Gleitschirmfliegen ✓ Paragleiten ✓ Drachenfliegen lernen in Salzburg.

Name: LINEA Crew Academy
Description:
Vous embarquerez pour une formation intensive de 4 semaines afin de préparer et passer votre CCA européen, diplôme indispensable, pour pouvoir postuler en tant qu’hôtesse de l’air ou steward dans une compagnie aérienne.
En nous choisissant ,vous serez formé et accompagné par des professionnels de l’aéronautique , dotés d’une belle expérience de vol.

Name: Grupo BlueDrone
Description:
En BlueDrone somos una empresa especializada en formación oficial, certificación y asesoría aeronáutica para pilotos, empresas, administraciones y unidades UAS.
Trabajamos bajo el marco normativo del RD 517/2024 y los escenarios STS-01/02 europeos, ofreciendo soluciones completas que integran:

	•	Formación A1/A3, A2, STS-ES- NE y STS-01/02 Europeo
	•	Preparación y certificación de pilotos para todos los sectores (energía, seguridad, inspecciones, audiovisual, emergencias, FFCCS y ayuntamientos)
	•	Consultoría técnica, ConOps, SORA y documentación aeronáutica
	•	Implantación y desarrollo de Unidades UAS municipales
	•	Operaciones aéreas en eventos, emergencias y entornos complejos

Nuestro objetivo es garantizar que cualquier organización que utilice drones pueda hacerlo con seguridad, cumplimiento normativo y máxima eficiencia operativa.

 Formación en toda España
 Entidad reconocida, facultada y designada por AESA
 +3.000 pilotos formados

Name: Magnolia Aviation
Description: Magnolia Aviation is an organization that believes its highest priorities drive our culture, safe decisions, and team behavior. Each of our instructors aims to bring out the best in every student. During your time at the Academy, you can expect our team to lead by example and be ready to support every student in their personal and professional growth.

Name: Maple Wings Flight Centre
Description:
Our Philosophy: Excellence in Aviation Training

At the heart of MWFC’s ethos lies a commitment to excellence. We understand that learning to fly is a significant investment, both in time and resources. That's why we’ve meticulously designed our training programs to provide comprehensive, practical, and safe instruction. Our experienced and certified flight instructors are dedicated to nurturing each student’s potential, ensuring they develop the skills and confidence needed to navigate the skies with proficiency.

Comprehensive Training Programs Tailored to Your Needs

Whether you’re taking your first step towards a Private Pilot License (PPL), aiming for a Commercial Pilot License (CPL), or seeking to enhance your skills with advanced ratings, MWFC offers a diverse range of programs to meet your aspirations. Our courses include:

Private Pilot License (PPL): Embark on your aviation journey with our PPL program, designed to equip you with the fundamental knowledge and skills required to fly solo and with passengers.   
Commercial Pilot License (CPL): Elevate your career prospects with our CPL program, preparing you for professional aviation roles.
Multi-Engine Rating: Expand your capabilities and open up new opportunities with our multi-engine rating course.
Instrument Rating: Master the art of flying in instrument meteorological conditions (IMC) with our rigorous instrument rating program.   
Flight Instructor Rating (FIR): Share your passion for flying and become a certified flight instructor, shaping the next generation of pilots.
Recreational Pilot Permit (RPP): A great option for those who wish to fly for fun, offering a less rigorous, more relaxed course.

Name: Hangar10
Description:
Hangar10 es un centro de simulación aeronáutica de referencia, especializado en formación profesional y experiencias de vuelo para entusiastas de la aviación. Ubicado en unas instalaciones completamente equipadas, contamos con dos simuladores de última tecnología: un Boeing 737-800 y un Airbus A320, diseñados para ofrecer una experiencia de vuelo realista y envolvente.

En el ámbito profesional, proporcionamos formación especializada para pilotos, incluyendo pre-assessment para aerolíneas, Type Ratings, MCC y otros programas avanzados. Nuestro equipo de instructores altamente cualificados garantiza una preparación óptima para afrontar los retos de la industria aeronáutica.

Además, en Hangar10 abrimos las puertas a todos los aficionados que sueñan con pilotar un avión. Nuestro servicio de simulación de ocio permite a cualquier persona experimentar la emoción de volar un avión comercial en un entorno controlado y seguro.

Además de formación aeronautica disponemos psicólogos especializados para preparar entrevistas como para superar cualquier fase del miedo a volar. 

Tanto para profesionales como para apasionados de la aviación, en Hangar10 ofrecemos una experiencia 360º, combinando realismo, aprendizaje y diversión en cada sesión de simulación.

 Descubre más sobre nosotros y ven a vivir la experiencia de volar en Hangar10.

Name: EXCEL Aviation
Description: Obtain your pilot's certificates with EXCEL Aviation.

Name: Alfa Aviation Academy
Description: At Alfa Aviation Academy, we believe that becoming a pilot is more than learning to fly—it’s about developing the judgment, professionalism and confidence to lead in the world’s most demanding cockpit environments. As an EASA-certified Approved Training Organization (ATO IT.ATO.0107) with bases in  Italy and Poland, we offer both Integrated and Modular pathways designed for aspiring airline pilots: ATPL Integrated (18–24 months) A full-time, structured program combining ground school and flight training. Ideal if you want the fastest route to an airline transport pilot license without prior experience. Modular Pathway (≈20 months) Study at your own pace: begin with a Private Pilot License, then progress through ATPL theory, instrument rating, and commercial license modules. Perfect for those who need scheduling flexibility. Why Choose Alfa Aviation Academy? EASA-Standard Curriculum Our syllabi strictly follow PART-FCL requirements, ensuring your license is recognized throughout all 31 EASA member states. Experienced Mentors Train under instructors with extensive European aviation backgrounds. They focus on mentorship—supporting you through every milestone and challenge. Pilot Core Competencies Beyond flight hours, we develop the human factors, decision-making and commercial awareness skills airlines value most, in partnership with our industry collaborators. Flexible Financing We assist eligible European students with tailored payment plans and scholarship opportunities, making your dream achievable. Whether you’re drawn to intensive, all-inclusive training or prefer breaking your studies into manageable modules, Alfa Aviation Academy provides the guidance, resources and professional network you need to succeed. Join our community

Name: dronestudio
Description:
Organisme de formation drone référencé Qualiopi dédié à la formation de pilote drone et aux métiers d’application du drone. Formation Certifiante RS5906. 
Une école de pilotage drone professionnelle, une solide formation certifiante  inscrite au répertoire spécifique (RS6539), deux centres de formation drone d’excellence.

Name: RotorJackets @ Georgia Tech
Description: RotorJackets educates Georgia Tech students about the technology surrounding Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), specifically those equipped with First-Person View (FPV) technology. We seek to offer students a hands-on learning experience by creating a safe environment for people to fly on campus and providing training on how to responsibly build and operate UAVs. Finally, we maintain a Georgia Tech MultiGP drone racing chapter to host local, regional, and national races that count towards our school’s national ranking.

Name: Delta Fly Adventures
Description: Deltavliegen dóet wat met mensen. Het geeft een enorm gevoel van vrijheid en zelfstandigheid en een unieke kijk op de wereld. Dat is zo bijzonder dat we dat met iedereen willen delen. Met duovluchten, cursussen, opleidingen; 1 op 1 en in groepsverband, in binnen- en buitenland. Met goed opgeleide instructeurs, materiaal van topkwaliteit en veiligheid altijd bovenaan. Deltavliegen is een prachtig avontuur.

Name: Mach 01 Flights & Events
Description:
MACH01 — L’école de pilotage & lieu d’événements d’exception aux portes de Paris

Basée sur l’aérodrome de Meaux-Esbly, MACH01 propose une double expérience unique :
 Une école de pilotage ULM haut de gamme (baptêmes, formations, initiations)
 Un espace événementiel de 600m², modulable et immersif, pour vos séminaires, lancements de produit, team building ou journées clients.

Pourquoi choisir MACH01 ?
• Un lieu atypique et inspirant, associé à l’univers aéronautique
• Des prestations sur mesure : location seule ou clé en main (traiteur, déco, animation, coordination)
• Des activités exclusives : baptêmes de l’air, vols d’initiation, challenge ULM
• Une accessibilité idéale depuis Paris, avec parking gratuit sur site

Nos services clés
• Séminaires & événements corporate
• Team building aérien
• Lancements de produit avec mise en scène
• Activités de cohésion dans un cadre original
• Prestations techniques : son, lumière, mobilier, traiteur

Name: PSB FORMA
Description:
PSB FORMA est un organisme de formation basé en Gironde, spécialisé dans le management, le lean management et la performance organisationnelle.

Nous accompagnons les dirigeants, managers et collaborateurs dans leurs transformations à travers des formations pragmatiques, opérationnelles et adaptées aux réalités du terrain.

 Notre mission : développer les compétences, renforcer la cohésion et placer l’expérience client au cœur de la performance durable.

 Nos expertises :

Name: Happy Skillz
Description:
Vivez-vous à la hauteur de votre plein potentiel ?

Le parcours professionnel d'aujourd'hui n'est pas le même que celui de vos parents, vous concevez et êtes propriétaire de votre évolution professionnelle.
Les hauts potentiels sont développés en fonction des besoins commerciaux et de la vision de l'entreprise.
Vous méritez d’avoir votre propre vision pour choisir vos employeurs et être satisfait.

 Je m'appelle Souad LAAMOUI et j'aide les talents à se développer pour réussir votre carrière.
 Depuis 2022, j'ai formé et coaché des talents qui travaillant dans des secteurs différents : banque, entrepreneurs, artistes, ingénieurs, enseignants, artisans, pharmacie, immobilier, btp. Mes clients ont différents profils, cadres supérieurs, PDG mais aussi des employés, des techniciens et des mères qui retournent au travail.

Avant de fonder HAPPY SKILLZ, j'ai exercé des fonctions transverses de gestion et pilotage budgétaire aux fonctions RH en qualité de cadre au sein de la Banque Edmond de Rothschild, ainsi qu’au sein du Ministère des Armées.

 Mon objectif est de faciliter le changement individuel et  permettre à tous les clients talentueux de mieux se connaitre pour une performance auto-piloté. Je suis une entrepreneuse dans l'âme et je me consacre à transformer ma vision en action.

Mon style de coaching est basé sur l'établissement d'une confiance et d'une connexion avec mes clients grâce à une compréhension approfondie de leurs besoins. Mon approche est construite sur la bienveillance, une grande empathie et un esprit positif.

Name: Rotor School Inc
Description: Rotor School's experience dates back to 1995 when Francisco Pacheco and Alejandro Mendoza founded a training centre in Venezuela. With more than 25 years of experience, Rotor School has graduated over 1,000 commercial pilot training students that developed their professional careers worldwide. Now we provide helicopter flight training to individuals in the United States.

Name: Simcheck
Description: Australia’s first Cessna Caravan (C208) Level D Full Motion Flight Simulator (FFS) is here to transform pilot training. We provide advanced, realistic training that goes beyond proficiency to prepare pilots for every scenario.

Name: Aeroaljarafe Centro de Formación Aeronáutico
Description:
En AeroAljarafe, llevamos más de 10 años formando pilotos y convirtiéndonos en un referente en la industria de la aviación. Nuestra historia está marcada por la pasión por la excelencia, el compromiso con la seguridad y la dedicación a brindar una formación de máxima calidad.

Lo que nos distingue no solo son nuestras instalaciones renovadas y modernizadas, sino también el firme propósito de que cada alumno desarrolle las habilidades y competencias necesarias para volar con confianza y profesionalismo. 

Además, hemos creado un mural con los nombres de todos los pilotos que han pasado por nuestra escuela, un homenaje a su esfuerzo y dedicación que sirve como fuente de motivación constante para las futuras generaciones. 

Si tu sueño es conquistar el cielo, este es tu momento. Únete a AeroAljarafe y despega hacia un futuro lleno de oportunidades. Nos vemos en el aire!

Name: Wright Base
Description: Wright Base provides premier Flight Training in Tullahoma, TN.

Name: DASSU - Deutsche Alpensegelflugschule Unterwössen e.V.
Description: DASSU- Deutsche Alpensegelflugschule Unterwössen e.V. ist eine der größten Flugschulen im Bereich Segelflug, Ultraleicht und Motorseglerausbildung. In einer traumhaften Kulisse südlich des Chiemsee gelegen zählt die DASSU zum absoluten Segelflug-Hotspot und ist weit über die Grenzen Deutschlands bekannt.

Name: AeroHow
Description: Bem-vindo à AeroHow, sua parceira dedicada à excelência na Aeronáutica. Decolamos em 09 de julho de 2023, impulsionando a aviação a novos patamares. Nossa missão é inovar, romper fronteiras e guiar clientes para um futuro promissor. Com uma equipe altamente especializada, oferecemos cursos práticos e soluções personalizadas, decifrando desafios com eficiência. Seja parte da família AeroHow, onde a paixão pelos céus se une à busca incessante por horizontes mais amplos. Vamos além, explorando novas possibilidades e conquistando alturas incríveis. Name: Prograde Aerospace
Description:
Prograde Aerospace develops portable, practical digital training tools for pilots and aircrew. Our focus is on creating reliable, self-contained software that enhances aviation learning, procedural understanding, and readiness across Defence and civil training environments.

Our products are designed to supplement existing training systems, not replace them, by giving students and instructors the ability to rehearse and refine critical skills anywhere, anytime. We focus on high-impact learning tools that bridge the gap between classroom, simulator, and cockpit.


Current products include:

• HUD-Sim – an iPad-based trainer presenting dynamic HUD and PFD displays with visual attitudes to support early development of instrument-scan habits and display recognition before simulator or aircraft exposure.

• NavMath – a digital trainer for mental dead reckoning and aviation maths, allowing pilots to practice core navigation skills on the ground before applying them in flight.

• Radio Check – a spoken communication trainer that lets users practice and refine ATC phraseology, radio calls, and readbacks through realistic verbal interaction.

Our tools are designed and built in Australia, with a focus on operational reliability, minimal infrastructure requirements, and practical use in both Defence and civilian pilot training pipelines.

Prograde Aerospace collaborates with training institutions, Defence innovation programs, and technology partners to improve how aircrew learn and maintain proficiency.

Description:
At Vertical Mission Training Center, we are dedicated to redefining the standards of helicopter flight training. Located at the heart of North Rhine-Westphalia in Mönchengladbach Airport, our facility stands as a beacon of innovation and excellence in aviation training.

We cater to a diverse clientele, ranging from individual pilots to companies, aviation agencies, and authorities across Central Europe. Our services are varied and include PPL practice flights, safety training, type ratings, check flights, and external load flights. Each program is meticulously tailored to the specific needs and requirements of our pilots, ensuring an unparalleled training experience.

Our team, comprised of passionate pilots and flight instructors, offers expert guidance in both technical and soft skills, ensuring a holistic training approach. The realism of our simulators is unmatched, offering high-precision motion tracking, full cockpit replicas, and advanced acoustics for an immersive experience.

At Vertical Mission Training Center, we are not just training pilots; we are shaping the future of aviation safety. Join us in this journey and experience the pinnacle of helicopter flight training.
