Name: Trans-Mediterranean Drone Aviation
Description:
Welcome to the Future of Drone Aviation: TDA Jordan
Welcome to Trans-Mediterranean Drone Aviation (TDA Jordan), the premier destination for elite drone pilot training and advanced Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS) solutions in Jordan and the broader Middle East & Africa (MEA) region.

As the first Approved Training Organisation (ATO) in Jordan and the MEA region certified to the unparalleled high standards of the European Union Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) and the Civil Aviation Regulatory Commission of Jordan (CARC), we set the definitive benchmark for safety, quality, and professionalism in drone operations. Our certification is not just a credential; it is our unwavering commitment to excellence, ensuring every graduate operates with the utmost competence and regulatory compliance anywhere in the world.

Our leadership is powered by a strategic and exclusive partnership with IDA Finland, a globally recognized pioneer in drone education and technology. This alliance allows us to deliver a world-class, standardized curriculum that combines Nordic innovation and precision with deep regional expertise and understanding.

At TDA Jordan, we are more than a training school; we are strategic partners in progress. We empower industries—from infrastructure and security to agriculture and filmmaking—by providing certified pilots, cutting-edge technology, and comprehensive UAS services. Our mission is to fuel the safe and revolutionary integration of drone technology across the MEA region.

Explore our EASA and CARC-compliant courses, discover our services, and join us as we shape the skylines of tomorrow. Your journey to becoming a globally recognized drone professional starts here.

TDA Jordan: Setting the Standard. Leading the Evolution.

Name: AEROCAMPO
Description:
Quem Somos - AEROCAMPO

Fundada em 2024, a AEROCAMPO é a maior escola de formação de pilotos no Pará e Maranhão. Comandada por Willame Frank, nosso CEO e fundador, a AEROCAMPO se destaca pela excelência na educação e pela inovação em soluções com drones.

Nosso foco principal é oferecer cursos de formação de pilotos, capacitando os alunos com as habilidades necessárias para atuar no mercado de trabalho. Nossa metodologia combina teoria e prática, garantindo que nossos alunos se tornem profissionais competentes e preparados para os desafios do setor.

Além da formação, a AEROCAMPO também fornece serviços de mapeamento e soluções para segurança pública, utilizando a tecnologia de drones para assegurar a integridade de eventos e áreas urbanas. Trabalhamos em colaboração com órgãos governamentais e empresas para garantir operações seguras e eficientes.

Outro serviço importante que oferecemos é a consultoria para regularização de empresas, orientando clientes sobre as melhores práticas e legislações relacionadas ao uso de drones em suas atividades. Nossa experiência nesse campo permite que beneficiemos nossos parceiros, assegurando conformidade e eficiência em suas operações.

Na AEROCAMPO, acreditamos no poder da inovação e na importância de formar profissionais capacitados para o futuro. Nossa equipe é composta por especialistas apaixonados pela tecnologia e pela educação, sempre prontos para ajudar nossos alunos e parceiros a alcançarem seus objetivos.

Se você busca se tornar um piloto ou precisa de soluções com drones para sua empresa, a AEROCAMPO é a sua melhor escolha. Junte-se a nós e eleve sua carreira ou seu negócio a novos horizontes com a nossa expertise.

Name: MJA Flight
Description:
MJA Flight is more than just a flight school; it's a passion project. We're a family-owned business located just north of Fort Worth, dedicated to sharing our love for general aviation with the next generation of pilots.

My husband and I are the founders of MJA Flight. He holds an ATP certificate with many years of experience in general aviation, and I am a Certified Flight Instructor. We are both firm believers in continuous improvement, constantly refining our teaching methods and staying current with industry knowledge to ensure you receive the best possible training.

Our goal is to do more than just teach you how to fly. We want to instill in you the true essence of being an aviator—a pilot who is not only skilled but also knowledgeable, responsible, and passionate about the craft. We currently operate a Cessna 152 and soon a Beechcraft Travel Air for multi-engine time building, providing a diverse and comprehensive learning experience.

Join us at MJA Flight, and let's turn your dream of flying into a reality.

Name: TRIMAILLE AERO FORMATION
Description:
Depuis 1985 date de création de notre centre de formation, de nombreux stagiaires nous ont confié leur cursus. Beaucoup d'entre eux ont intégré des compagnies aériennes nationales et étrangères.

Les évolutions réglementaires, ainsi que l'utilisation de moyens de simulation sophistiqués nous ont aidé à diminuer le coût de nos formations. Si pour l'instant le recrutement de pilotes est limité en France, il demeure à l'étranger.

Néanmoins, la pyramide des âges devrait provoquer dans quelques temps une nouvelle demande de nos compagnies aériennes; compte tenu de l'étroitesse des périodes de sélection et d'embauche, il conviendra d'avoir les prérequis à l'embauche : ATPL théorique, CPL, IRME, MCC et Advanced UPRT.

Idéalement placé en région parisienne, notre espace de formation alterne entre les aérodromes à proximité, de faible trafic, nantis des moyens de procédures les plus récents et l'évolution dans les zones communes aux aéroports de Charles de Gaulle et d'Orly, assurant une parfaite formation dans les espaces à trafic intense et de discipline radiophonique.

La formation à l'application d'une méthode et d'une organisation de travail sera la base la plus solide aux évolutions de votre carrière de pilote, donc ne prenez pas de risque.

Name: Spartan Flight Academy
Description: Spartan Flight Academy, part of Spartan Education Group (SEG), provides professional pilot training under FAA Part 61 at Grand Prairie Municipal Airport (KGPM) in Texas. The location provides pilot training toward five FAA certificates and ratings, including Private Pilot (ASEL), Instrument Airplane, Commercial Pilot, Multi-Engine, and Certified Flight Instructor (CFI). Located in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area, Spartan Flight Academy builds on SEG’s nearly century-long legacy by continuing a tradition of quality aviation training experience that has defined Spartan since 1928. Name: TecFlight Australia
Description:
TecFlight operates a Tecnam P2006T MKII multi-engine training aircraft and a state-of-the-art Frasca Reconfigurable Training Device.
P2006T:
Available for all phases of complex multi-engine and IFR training. It has a retractable undercarriage, constant-speed propellers, and economical semi-liquid-cooled Rotax engines. This machine is an absolute dream to fly.

The full IFR-rated all-glass flight deck, featuring a Garmin G1000NXI system, provides DME, ADSB Traffic Avoidance system, and S-Tec 55 coupled Autopilot. This platform equips students well for their initial ME rating, multi-engine IF rating, IF recency, and renewals.

All Garmin databases are fully maintained with current Australian navigation, terrain, DAP information, and Garmin's "Safe Taxi" system.

Industry experts comment on how easy the P2006T is to handle on the ground and in the air, "the machine provides that Big Airplane feel".

Frasca Flight Training Simulator:
This platform accurately replicates a Cessna 172S aircraft with a traditional instrument panel plus 2 x Garmin GNS 430W GPS units, or it can be reconfigured as a Piper Seminole PA44 twin-engine aircraft with a Garmin G1000NXI glass flight deck. Garmin has licenced Frasca to rehost their G1000NXI software, so the simulator provides an identical flight training experience.

TecFlight has carefully selected the highly accredited "Central Coast Aero Club" to provide training on both of these devices.

Contact the Central Coast Aero Club: (02) 4392-5174, or visit: www.ccac.com.au

Fllying on the Central Coast:
Less than an hour from Sydney, the Central Coast offers a superb flight training environment, with its majestic coastline, the freedom of uncongested airspace, and a professional, friendly CCAC training team.

Name: Red Cardinal Aviation
Description:
Red Cardinal Aviation was founded in 2024 by Hussein and Haider, two passionate aviators who met during Haider’s initial flight training, with Hussein as his instructor. Their shared love for aviation and dedication to helping others achieve their dreams in the sky led them to establish a flight school focused on excellence and community. Hussein, now an airline pilot flying the Embraer 175 regional jet, brings a decade of experience in commercial aviation, while Haider, a Certified Flight Instructor now, shares his enthusiasm for teaching and mentoring aspiring pilots.

 Both Hussein and Haider have been passionate about aviation since childhood, and their mission is to inspire and equip the next generation of pilots with the skills and knowledge needed to succeed. At Red Cardinal, we’re dedicated to providing training that’s as unique as you are. We’re here to support you at every step of your journey, creating a welcoming environment where you can build the skills and confidence you need to succeed. Our focus is on helping you grow not just as a pilot, but as an individual, sharing our passion for aviation every step of the way.

Name: Aviation Technical Training SE.147.0001
Description:
Vi är en flygteknikskola som utbildar flygtekniker och mekaniker i kategorierna B1.1, B1.3, B1.4, B2 och A. Mekanikerutbildningen bedrivs som en gymnasieutbildning och flygteknikerdelen är en yrkeshögskoleutbildning.

Utbildningen regleras av EU:s lagstiftning inom det europeiska luftfartsregelverket. Det innebär att du efter genomförd godkänd utbildning och praktik kan erhålla en certifiering (part-66) som är godkänd i hela Europa. De teoretiska examinationerna genomförs av studenterna på en av regelverket avsatt tid och består av flervalsfrågor och i förekommande fall essäfrågor. Även praktiska examinationer genomförs.

Flygtekniker: https://osyh.se/flygtekniker/
Fokus på ansvar och kvalitet
Som flygtekniker har du ett stort ansvar och många personer litar på att ditt arbete utförs korrekt, kraven på säkerhet och kvalitet är höga. Att kunna inhämta information ur manualer och tillgodogöra sig ny teknik, både på svenska och engelska, är något yrkesrollen kräver. Som flygtekniker verkar du både självständigt och i samarbete med andra. Vanliga arbetsuppgifter inkluderar underhåll av flygfarkoster, struktur och kompositarbeten samt planering och beredning av underhåll

Mekaniker:
Flygteknikutbildningen är för dig som vill arbeta som flygmekaniker med tekniskt underhåll inom flygplan, helikopter eller rymd, eller som mekaniker/montör i flygindustrin. Du kan även studera vidare till flyg- eller helikoptertekniker på yrkeshögskolan och underlätta vägen mot att bli pilot eller läsa andra högskoleutbildningar. Utbildningen är en riksrekryterande gymnasieutbildning och ställer höga krav på studiemotivation. Du behöver vara noggrann, ha ett intresse för tekniska studier och ett gott handlag för praktiskt arbete.

https://www.linkoping.se/forskola-och-utbildning/gymnasieskola/kommunala-gymnasieskolor/anders-ljungstedts-gymnasium/program-och-inriktningar-alg/flygteknikutbildningen/

Name: Veterans Elite Drone Training Services
Description:
Welcome to Veterans Elite Drone Training Services, where we provide top-tier training to military veterans across Canada. Our program is designed to empower veterans with the skills and knowledge required to become certified drone pilots, opening up exciting career opportunities in a variety of industries.

As veterans ourselves, we understand the unique needs of our students and tailor our courses to provide a supportive learning environment. We are funded by Veterans Affairs Canada (VAC) for eligible veterans who retired after 2006.

Our highly skilled instructors are themselves veterans, bringing a wealth of practical experience and knowledge to the drone training process. Our courses are designed to provide hands-on experience that covers all aspects of drone technology, safety, regulations and flight procedures to ensure our graduates are equipped for success.

With course locations across Canada, our program is accessible to veterans from coast to coast. Our goal is to provide high-quality drone training to veterans and empower them to achieve success in the civilian world.

If you are a veteran interested in gaining a practical  skill in the world of drones, we are here to support your success. Contact us today to learn more about our veteran-funded drone training program, certified by Transport Canada

Name: Aerohire Flight Training
Description:
Aerohire flight training and flying school at Wolverhampton Halfpenny Green Airport, West Midlands, are a flight training organisation and believe passionately about providing friendly, professional and honest flight training.

Aerohire provide friendly and professional instruction for the Private Pilots Licence (PPL) and Light Aircraft Pilots Licence (LAPL). We also provide Trial Lessons and Air Experiences for those who wish to discover the joys of general aviation before making a commitment to training for a licence. We also offer Night and Aerobatics Rating training. 

We believe strongly in being a friendly, professional & honest flight training organisation, taking the time to get to know our valued customers with the aim of making general aviation accessible and fun for the many, not the few.

We are looking to introduce the extraordinary privilege of flight to those with a passion for aviation. We are small enough to care about you and support you on your fantastic journey. 

Welcome to Aerohire and the skies above!

Name: Airlink Flight School
Description:
AirLink Flight School – Your Pathway from India to the Skies

AirLink Flight School is an FAA-approved flight training academy in the USA with campuses in Maine and Florida, offering a dedicated DGCA-compliant program specially designed for Indian students.

We help aspiring Indian pilots launch their careers with cost-effective, structured, and internationally recognized training that meets both FAA and DGCA standards. Our program includes ground school support in India and practical flight training in the U.S., allowing you to complete your CPL, IR, and ME ratings, and return to India with all requirements needed for DGCA license conversion.

 Why Indian Students Choose AirLink:
DGCA-Aligned CPL Program: Includes 200 hours FAA flight training, ground classes, and guidance for DGCA conversion.

Modern Fleet & Simulators: Train on Cessna 172s, Piper Warriors, Diamonds, and Redbird simulators.

SEVIS-Certified: We assist with M1 visa processing and student onboarding.

Fast Track Options: Complete your training in as little as 8–12 months.

Affordable Costs: Competitive pricing with loan assistance via Stratus Financial and Skybound.

Introductory Ground Classes in India: Get a head start before heading to the U.S.

 Your Training Journey:
DGCA Ground School – Complete initial subjects like Navigation, Meteorology, Regulations, and Technical General in India.

FAA Flight Training in USA – Complete PPL, IR, CPL, and Multi-Engine in a structured, immersive environment.

DGCA License Conversion – Return with required hours and documentation for easy conversion.

 Global Career Edge
Whether your goal is to fly for Indian carriers like IndiGo, Air India, or Vistara—or to explore global opportunities—AirLink prepares you with the skills and confidence to succeed.

Fly Beyond Borders. Train the Right Way.
Join hundreds of Indian students who’ve turned their pilot dreams into careers. Visit www.airlinkflightschool.com/india-dgca-program for more details.

Name: TakeFlight Interactive
Description:
TakeFlight Interactive is the leader in interactive flight training solutions. We are revolutionizing aviation training with immersive simulation technologies. Our mission is to modernize training pipelines by delivering highly engaging and interactive learning experiences which increase the accessibility and efficacy of training across the aviation industry and beyond. 

𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗪𝗲 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗲𝗿:

• 𝗔𝗱𝘃𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲𝗱 𝗦𝗶𝗺𝘂𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺: We develop cutting-edge flight simulation training software that is simulator agnostic that can be tailored for a wide range of aircraft and training types

Name: HELI COMPANY
Description:
HELI COMPANY s.r.o. is a flight school offering a comprehensive portfolio of flight training services for helicopter and aircraft pilots, aviation maintenance personnel, and ICAO English language teaching and testing. We also provide type training for aviation, ground personnel, and air transport.

Our teaching facilities are located at Košice International Airport, including classrooms and simulators. We are a certified organization that is by the Aviation Regulations.

In the future, we want to train many more pilots, especially to continue flying without accidents. We are constantly expanding our service offer and fleet, which allows us to train pilots and mechanics on the following types: UH-60A, S-300, MD500, MD530, Bell-206, and AS355N.

Name: BGSU Aviation
Description:
Since its inception in 1978, BGSU's aviation program has produced some of the most competent, highly skilled airline pilots, cargo pilots, airport managers, FBO managers, corporate executives, and military professionals!

BGSU Aviation is a FAR Part 141 approved flight education and training program. Aviation majors choose from one of two specializations: Flight Technology and Operations (FTO) or Aviation Management and Operations (AMO). Coursework in each specialization is complemented with business and liberal arts classes that differentiate BGSU’s program from other similar programs.

Each specialization offers a combination of theory and hands-on practice, including cooperative education work experiences. The faculty are leaders in using and teaching emerging technologies and practices in the field of aviation. The program is fully accredited by The Association of Technology, Management, and Applied Engineering (ATMAE) and The Aviation Accreditation Board International (AABI).

Name: Aéroclub du Soleil
Description:
L’Aéroclub du Soleil créé en 1962 par le célèbre Paul Ricard est installé sur l’aérodrome de Cuers-Pierrefeu dans le Var au bord de la grande bleue.

Aéro-club affilié à la F.F.A.
L’Aéroclub du Soleil est affilié à la Fédération Française Aéronautique (agréé Jeunesse et Sport).

Une école de pilotage
L’école de pilotage de l’Aéroclub du Soleil dispense des cours en vol et au sol permettant aux jeunes pilotes de préparer et de devenir de futurs pilotes professionnels, et aux moins jeunes tout aussi passionnés d’obtenir une licence de pilote privé. Nous vous attendons pour vous en dire plus et partager avec vous notre passion : voler !

We offer private, commercial, instrument, ATP, and instructor pilot training in both twin and single engine aircraft with a focus on quality of flight instruction versus quantity. Name: EventDrone.pl
Description:
EVENTDRONE zajmuje się organizacją o eventów, zawodów, pokazów i szkoleń opartych o tematykę dronową. Nasza ekipa to zapaleńcy i pasjonaci związani z dronami od samego początku istnienia tej branży. Wśród nas są doświadczeni szkoleniowcy, uczestnicy zawodów droneracing, operatorzy i fotografowie. Możemy pochwalić się organizacją dużych szkoleń i eventów dla znanych marek związanych z motoryzacją. Z radością podejmiemy się wyzwania organizacji dla państwa kolejnego wydarzenia dronowego.

Zajmujemy się szkoleniami pilotów bezzałogowych statków powietrznych ( NSTS ) i to jest nasza najmocniejsza strona! Ponadto przeprowadzamy zaawansowane usługi z wykorzystaniem bezzałogowych statków powietrznych takie jak inspekcje turbin wiatrowych, fotowoltaiki czy infrastruktury krytycznej i energetycznej.
Rozpoczęliśmy również działalności związanej z organizacją nowatorskich atrakcji eventowych, w których wykorzystujemy bezzałogowe statki powietrzne i które za każdym razem malują na twarzach uczestników tych wydarzeń szerokie uśmiechy. Budujemy i organizujemy od podstaw całe imprezy, zawody dronów czy pokazy. Ponadto przeprowadzamy też zaawansowane usługi z wykorzystaniem bezzałogowych statków powietrznych.

Ancien pilote militaire, aujourd'hui instructeur avion indépendant je dispose d'un partenariat exclusif avec la plus grande école de pilotage de République Tchèque qui assure aussi des missions de secourisme en hélicoptère, des vol de rapatriement, du transport de VIP et qui dispose sur place de ses propres ateliers de maintenance aéronautique assurant une disponibilité exceptionnelle des aéronefs.

Vous obtiendrez directement après votre formation votre licence de pilote avion ou hélicoptère EASA française ou compléterez votre licence française actuelle tout en gagnant en expérience et en progressant en anglais grâce aux vols à l'étranger.
ATPL intégré (avion) et modulaire, IR SE, IR ME, CPL, PPL, Advanced UPRT, MCC...

Enfin vous réaliserez d'importantes économies tant sur le coût des formations que dans la vie quotidienne.

Together, they have experience of more than 50 years in rural sales and marketing and are on a mission to revolutionize agriculture and allied services through use of Drones.

They have diversified business interests in many countries including a veneer and plywood manufacturing unit in African countries (Gabon and Liberia), an upcoming multi-speciality hospital in Jaipur and distribution of electric vehicles and three wheelers in Rajasthan. Name: Get Your Wings Ltd
Description:
In February 2024, Get Your Wings flying school will open its doors at the Felthorpe Airfield near Norwich. Whether you're looking to experience a trial flight, pleasure flights, or embark on a pilot training journey, we look forward to welcoming you.

Experience the joy of flying over the breathtaking North Norfolk coast in our modern aircraft. Falling under the new microlight category of Light Sport Microlights, our aircraft boasts an impressive Maximum Take-Off Weight (MTOW) of 560kg and is quite possibly the most advanced C42C in the UK. Featuring an Electronic Flight Information System (EFIS), the latest super-efficient E-Prop, electric flaps, upgraded brakes, and, as of the current writing, probably the only UK C42 equipped with an autopilot.

Immerse yourself in the world of aviation with our unparalleled technology and training, as you learn to fly in this cutting-edge aircraft. From your very first flight to the mastery of your Skills Test, our flying school is dedicated to providing a top-tier aviation education, tailored to your individual needs.

Name: ENF Rouen Permis Bateaux Normandie
Description:
Naviguez vers la liberté avec votre école de permis bateau à Rouen !

Située au cœur de la Normandie, à Rouen, votre école de permis bateaux ENF ROUEN vous accompagne dans l'obtention de votre permis bateau, quel que soit votre niveau et vos aspirations.

Nous formons des navigateurs passionnés et responsables, leur permettant de découvrir les plaisirs de la navigation en mer, en rivière ou sur les plans d'eau intérieurs.

ENF ROUEN Permis Bateaux Normandie a rejoint la FNBE pour s'engager en faveur d'une formation au permis bateau de qualité, sérieuse et conforme aux exigences réglementaires.

Notre équipe expérimentée et pédagogue met tout en œuvre pour vous offrir une formation de qualité, personnalisée et adaptée à vos besoins.

Nous vous proposons une large gamme de formations pour tous les types de permis bateau :

Permis bateau côtier : Naviguez jusqu'à 6 milles nautiques des côtes françaises.
Permis bateau fluvial : Explorez les rivières et les canaux français en toute liberté.
Permis bateau hauturier : Partez à la découverte des grands espaces maritimes sans limite de distance.

ENF ROUEN, c'est aussi :
Des bateaux parfaitement équipés pour une formation optimale en mer et en eaux intérieures.
Des cours théoriques et pratiques dispensés dans des locaux conviviale et à taille humaine.
Un suivi individualisé pour vous permettre de progresser à votre rythme.
Des formations flexibles pour s'adapter à vos contraintes horaires et professionnelles.
Des tarifs attractifs pour rendre le permis bateau accessible à tous.

En plus de la formation au permis bateau, ENF ROUEN vous propose également :
Des stages de perfectionnement pour approfondir vos connaissances et vos compétences en navigation.
Des locations de bateaux pour naviguer en toute autonomie.
Des conseils personnalisés pour l'achat de votre bateau.

Que vous soyez débutant ou navigateur confirmé, ENF ROUEN est votre école de permis bateau à Rouen.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter :o)

Name: Altar Parapente
Description:
Altar Parapente eleva el vuelo libre y motorizado en Argentina a un nuevo estándar.

Como representantes oficiales de Niviuk en el país, ofrecemos parapentes, arneses, accesorios y formación profesional para pilotos de todos los niveles.

Nuestra red de partners y distribuidores en todo el territorio, junto con un equipo especializado, nos permite brindar asesoramiento personalizado, soporte técnico y entrega de equipos de forma rápida y segura.

En Altar, combinamos pasión por volar, innovación y experiencia para que cada piloto cuente con las mejores herramientas para disfrutar del cielo.

 Parapentes | Vuelo Libre | Paramotor | Formación | Equipos Niviuk
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: SkyCatcher
Description: SkyCatcher connects private pilots across Australia who share a passion for flight and adventure. Plan your next journey together, share the experience and the costs, and discover the joy of flying with like-minded aviators.

Name: Rotterdamsche Aeroclub
Description:
The Rotterdamsche Aero Club (RAC) is around since 1926! Even Charles Lindbergh visited us back in 1927 before he flew solo and non-stop across the Atlantic as the first person ever. So you might say flying is in our blood! 

The RAC has an official flying school with its own fleet of modern aircraft. We are also certified as an ATO: Approved Training Organisation.

Want to know more about flying or about the atmosphere in the club? Feel free to call, email or shoot us a message on instagram (@rotterdamscheaeroclub). Interested in a trial lesson? Email us.

Name: Işıklar Askeri Hava Lisesi
Description: Isiklar Military Air High School was a prestigious secondary-level institution operated by the Turkish Air Force between 2008 and 2016. Located in Bursa, the school combined academic excellence with military training to prepare cadets for admission to the Turkish Air Force Academy. Its curriculum focused on leadership, discipline, aeronautical sciences, and physical fitness, aiming to develop well-rounded candidates for future officer roles. The school played a key role in shaping the next generation of Air Force personnel until its closure as part of broader military education reforms in 2016.

Name: Columbia Training Centers
Description: Columbia Training Centers is a nonprofit flight school based in the DC Metro area, proudly Black-owned and dedicated to expanding access to aviation. We offer high-quality flight training and aircraft rental for students at every stage, from Private Pilot through Certified Flight Instructor (CFI). With a team of experienced instructors and a supportive learning environment, we’re here to help you take flight. Learn more at ctc-usa.org and start your journey today.

Name: Stash Ventures, LLC
Description:
Stash Ventures LLC is a small, sole proprietorship LLC providing specialized aerospace and defense industry consultation and training.  The company owns and operates a Cessna A185F on amphibious floats.
We are not a cannabis company!

About the CEO:
- Retired US Navy Fighter Pilot with day/night arrested landings on 10 different aircraft carriers
- Avid motorcycle rider with over 100,000 miles ridden
- Current floatplane owner and operator
- Logged flight hours in over 60 unique Type / Model / Series aircraft

Name: Indian Air Force Test Pilots School (IAFTPS)
Progress Flight Academy
Description:
Progress Flight Academy specialises in providing premium flight training to clients who wish to achieve a genuine operational capability in multi-engine piston aeroplanes and attain the Commercial Pilot Licence with Multi-engine Instrument Rating (CPL/IR (ME)).

The flight training syllabus on our Professional Pilot Course is highly structured and based on best international practice; the European Joint Aviation Authorities Flight Crew Licensing standard (JAA-FCL). Theory training is to the South Africa syllabus for the Airline Transport Pilot Licence.

Residential students are accommodated on the flight school campus at Progress Aerodrome, near Port Elizabeth in South Africa. The private aerodrome is exclusive to our students so there is no traffic congestion; and the close proximity of the General Flying Area and instrument training facilities ensures efficient use of flying training time.

A fleet of well equipped late model Piper Warrior III aeroplanes and a Vulcanair P68R aeroplane is used for the flying training. The fleet is owned and operated by the flying school. Competitive pricing together with efficient use results in excellent value.

Progress Flight Academy graduates have performed well in conversion to Boeing 737 and other turbine aeroplanes after completion of pilot training for South African Airways, Kenya Airways, and Tanzania Civil Aviation Authority.

Name: Island Coastal Aviation Inc.
Description: Island Coastal Aviation Inc. is one of the best flight school in Canada specializing in advanced flight training, including floatplane/seaplane, mountain, night, IFR Rating and more. Learn from passionate and experienced instructors with years of experience in aviation industry.

Name: Aviator Training academy Hyderabad
Description:
3- Steps to Start Your Career With Airlines Join - Train - Fly 
1. Join us and become a good cabin crew member.
2. Get trained with 16+ Years experienced faculty. 
3. Fly with Aviation Training Academy (ATA).

Name: Air Fleet Training Systems
Description: At Air Fleet Training Systems, we strive to build trust and teamwork while providing professional aviation training for individuals from all around the world. Our vision is to create a globally known high-quality pilot training company that unites highly skilled professionals with great aviation enthusiasm. We have been training pilots since 1991. We own the youngest aircraft fleet in the US Northeast and all planes are serviced in our in-house maintenance department.

Name: Airman Flight Training
Description:
Airman Flight Training is a company based out of Long Beach, California, United States. Airman operates newer models of Cessna 172 SP and simulator with the most advanced way of ground training. Aircraft like Cessna 172 SP, Cessna 172 S G1000. Simulator Like Redbird MCX Full Motion Simulator Dual Controls. Organized Flight Syllabus by (Ralph Butcher). Online Ground lesson all using Rod Machado Books and videos.

we offer only the highest quality pilot training and a diverse fleet of the most well-maintained training and rental aircraft. Our fleet of aircraft features the latest in GPS, glass panels, XM weather, real-time traffic information, and safety technology from today’s leading manufacturers.

Simulator

We also operate a full-motion Redbird MCX airplane flight simulator that is FAA certified as an Advanced Aviation Training Device(AATD), which allows to conduct and log at least 50 hours out of you commercial training including 20 hours out of Instrument Training and 2.5 hours from Private Pilot training.

Flight Instructors

Our team of  highly experienced flight instructors is composed of knowledgeable teachers who share your desire to succeed. They have been carefully selected and screened to provide a comprehensive learning experience and the success of our graduates is proof of their capabilities.

We always insist on efficiency to make student money worth the training. Our average Student solo’s between 15 to 20 hours. Private around 50 to 55 hours. We believe we have best and speedy maintenance usually zero downtimes as we have back up planes. 

We conduct business according to four simple principles:
Honesty: We tell the truth
 
Integrity: We do the right thing even when no one is looking
 
Performance: We deliver what we promise.

Efficiency: Make your money worth it.

Name: Helicopter Flight Training Services GmbH
Description:
Die HFTS Helicopter Flight Training Services GmbH ist als Gemeinschaftsunternehmen der Airbus Helicopters Deutschland GmbH, CAE Elektronik Deutschland GmbH, Rheinmetall Electronics GmbH und Thales Deutschland GmbH der weltweit erste und führende Anbieter von Dienstleistungen auf Simulatoren für den Transporthubschrauber NH90. 
Die HFTS betreibt vier Full-Flight Simulatoren (FFS) und die dafür peripheren Unterstützungssysteme an drei Standorten in Deutschland für die Ausbildung der Piloten des modernsten Mehrzweck-Militärtransporthubschraubers NH90 der Bundeswehr.
Mit unseren Mitarbeitern unterstützen wir unsere Kunden bei den täglichen Herausforderungen der fliegerischen Ausbildung und stellen die technische Verfügbarkeit der Ausbildungsmittel sicher. Hierbei kooperiert die HFTS auf Basis der aktuellsten Techniken zur Simulation einer hochmodernen virtuellen Umgebung mit den weltweit führenden Herstellern von Simulationstechnik.

Name: Airlink Flight School
Description: Airlink Flight School is a company based out of 2 Lafleur Rd, Waterville, Maine, United States.

Name: AERDROIDS TECHNOLOGY PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
About Us – Aerdroids RPTO

At Aerdroids Remote Pilot Training Organisation (RPTO), we take pride in being an authorized and approved Remote Pilot Training Organisation (RPTO) by the Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA), under the Ministry of Civil Aviation, Government of India. Based in Coimbatore, Aerdroids RPTO is dedicated to providing world-class drone training programs that meet the highest regulatory standards and prepare individuals for successful careers in the dynamic UAV (Unmanned Aerial Vehicle) industry.

Our mission is to equip aspiring drone pilots with the skills, knowledge, and certifications required to excel in the fast-evolving drone sector. Whether you are a beginner looking to step into this exciting field or a professional aiming to enhance your expertise, Aerdroids RPTO is your trusted Drone Training partner.

Name: Aero Club Brescia
Description:
The Aero Club Brescia is a sports association with the aim of spreading aeronautical awareness to all those who wish to learn about flying and thus realize man's oldest dream.
The Association is non-profit, this means that our members and our students are members and not customers: we constantly update our courses to offer a cutting-edge training service, we do not seek any compromise on our safety and we offer uninterrupted training with aeronautical themed evenings for the benefit of all members.

Name: LOT Flight Academy
Description:
LOT Flight Academy to nowoczesne centrum szkoleniowe stworzone w 2015 roku pod skrzydłami Polskich Linii Lotniczych LOT- największego przewoźnika lotniczego w Polsce. Naszym celem jest kształcenie przyszłych pilotów zgodnie z najwyższymi standardami branżowymi.

Oferujemy kompleksowe szkolenia lotnicze zarówno teoretyczne, jak i praktyczne, prowadzące do uzyskania licencji pilota liniowego (ATPL). Specjalizujemy się w modułowym programie 0-ATPL(A), a nasza oferta obejmuje również kursy uzupełniające, takie jak UPRT Advanced, MCC i JOC.

Szkolenia praktyczne realizujemy na nowoczesnych samolotach marki Tecnam, a zajęcia prowadzą wykwalifikowani instruktorzy i piloci Polskich Linii Lotniczych LOT. Naszym lotniskiem szkoleniowym jest EPPT Piotrków Trybunalski.

Dysponujemy również zaawansowanymi symulatorami AlSim ALX oraz Boeing 737-MAX, a także prowadzimy szkolenia Type Rating dla grup zorganizowanych.

Jesteśmy częścią Polskiej Akademii Lotniczej i Polskiej Grupy Lotniczej.

Name: CF2R
Description: Spécialiste de la formation 2 roues, le CF2R est une moto-école exclusive disposant de plus de 4000 m² de piste privée sur place pour que votre apprentissage se fasse en sécurité. De la formation au Permis AM (50cc) au perfectionnement post permis, en passant par les formations 125cc ou permis A2, le CF2R saura répondre à votre besoin sur Bordeaux et sa région.

Name: eSAFePath
Description: we go beyond just helping learners complete their certification. Our platform provides an intuitive dashboard that gives learners a clear overview of their progress, helping them stay on track with their training. With a focus on flexibility, students can manage their learning schedules effectively, ensuring they complete their courses on time and achieve their certification goals with confidence.

Name: Salt Aviation
Description:
Profesjonalne szkolenie lotnicze – Twoja droga do chmur! 

Jesteśmy certyfikowaną Organizacją Szkoleniową ATO, oferującą kompleksowe szkolenia lotnicze na samoloty i śmigłowce. Nasza baza operacyjna znajduje się na lotnisku Warszawa-Modlin (EPMO), skąd realizujemy szkolenia zarówno dla przyszłych pilotów rekreacyjnych, jak i zawodowych.

W naszej ofercie znajdziesz:
 Licencje samolotowe: PPL(A), CPL(A), IR(A), ME, FI(A)
 Licencje śmigłowcowe: PPL(H), CPL(H), FI(H)
 Loty zapoznawcze dla pasjonatów lotnictwa
 Wynajem samolotów i śmigłowców

Dysponujemy nowoczesną flotą renomowanych producentów, takich jak Diamond Aircraft, Piper Aircraft, Beechcraft i Robinson, co gwarantuje bezpieczeństwo i najwyższy komfort szkolenia.

Dołącz do grona naszych absolwentów i zacznij swoją przygodę z lotnictwem już dziś! Skontaktuj się z nami i wznieś się na nowy poziom.

Name: Unmanned Aircraft Systems Technology Club at ERAU
Description: This organization has been developed to forward the advancement of unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) technologies from a design, development, and operations perspective. The goal of this organization is to capture state-of-the-art ideas and incorporate student-led initiatives that may lead to the advancement of both practical and theoretical applications in this industry. We want to increase awareness of UAS and showcase the incredible capabilities of these systems in an array of applications. Students will be exposed to unique opportunities within the field of UAS that will define a clear conceptual understanding of new technologies and trends in this emergent field. This organization promotes teamwork and leadership qualities with the opportunity to participate in cutting-edge research and applications within industry. This organization will provide you with the necessary knowledge, skills and abilities to excel in the exciting field of UAS. The UAS organization is led by the Aeronautical Science Department and requires each student to be a United States citizen, pursuant to current rules and regulations pertaining to UAS.

Name: 3NG Consulting Excel
Description:
Notre cabinet est spécialisé dans l’exploitation avancée de Microsoft Excel comme outil stratégique d’aide à la décision et de pilotage de la performance. Nous accompagnons les entreprises et les professionnels dans l’optimisation de leurs processus de gestion à travers quatre axes d’intervention complémentaires :

Formation Excel sur mesure
Nous proposons des formations pratiques et ciblées, adaptées aux niveaux et besoins spécifiques de chaque organisation : prise en main, fonctions avancées, tableaux croisés dynamiques, macros, VBA, Power Query, Power Pivot, etc. L’objectif : renforcer l’autonomie et l’efficacité des équipes sur Excel.

Montage de tableaux de bord de pilotage
Nous concevons des tableaux de bord dynamiques et visuels sur Excel pour aider nos clients à suivre leurs indicateurs de performance, analyser leurs données en temps réel, et prendre des décisions éclairées. Nos tableaux sont personnalisés selon les métiers (finance, RH, commercial, production, etc.).

Modélisation et amélioration de fichiers Excel
Nous intervenons pour modéliser des fichiers complexes (budgets, business plans, prévisionnels, reportings) ou pour fiabiliser et optimiser des fichiers existants. Nos solutions visent à automatiser les tâches répétitives, améliorer la lisibilité des données et réduire les erreurs de manipulation.

Mise en place d’outils de gestion sur Excel
Qu’il s’agisse de gestion commerciale, de planification, de suivi d’activité ou de gestion budgétaire, nous développons des outils adaptés aux spécificités de chaque client, en exploitant toute la puissance d’Excel comme levier de performance opérationnelle.

Notre valeur ajoutée :

Expertise technique avancée sur Excel

Approche pédagogique orientée résultats

Solutions concrètes, durables et personnalisées

Gain de temps, fiabilité et performance des outils

Name: Waypoint - Aviation Training Management System
Description:
Waypoint is a modern training management system built for aviation operators who want less admin and more training impact.

From small AOC and ATO teams to complex multi base, multi fleet operators, Waypoint brings your training records, forms, workflows, and currency tracking into one secure, audit ready hub. Training Managers can create and manage people, events, and report templates. Instructors can view training history, complete reports, and capture meaningful evidence against your competencies. Pilots and crew get clear visibility of their records and can acknowledge or query reports, creating a transparent, professional paper trail.

Designed around CBTA and EBT principles, Waypoint supports configurable competencies and observable behaviours per company, so you can align to your operation and regulator expectations without forcing a one size fits all process. Standardise Line Training, LIFUS, OPC and LPC, line checks, and bespoke requalification programmes with consistent templates and approval stages.

Our mission is simple: reduce friction, improve oversight, and help crews stay current, competent, and confident. If you are ready to replace spreadsheets and scattered PDFs with a system your team will actually use, Waypoint is your next step.

Name: Topgun Simulator
Description:
עולם דינאמי, מציאותי, של מהירויות על-קוליות, של גבהים משתנים במהירות עצומה של עשרות אלפי רגל מעל פני האדמה, עולם של תמרונים, של קרבות אוויר, הפצצת מטרות, חוויות ותחושות שרק טייסי קרב מכירים.

את חווית הטיסה שלכם אצלנו תתחילו בטיסה ראשונה בה תלמדו את יסודות הטיסה ותטעמו את עולם קרבות האוויר. לאחר מכן, יפתח בפניכם עולם שלם של מסלולי טיסה מתקדמים ולטובים שבינכם מחכה בית הספר לטיסה שלנו שם תוכלו להתמקצע בעולם הטיסה הקרבית.

אנו מעצבים, מתכננים, ובונים את תאי הטייס שלנו עצמאית. 

מתחם הסימולטורים מתאים לכולם, מגיל 8 ועד גיל 120.
אין צורך בניסיון טיסה קודם.

Name: Flight Academy Australia
Description:
Based at Melbourne’s Essendon Airport, FLIGHT ACADEMY AUSTRALIA is approximately 5 nautical miles (10 kilometres) north of Melbourne CBD. 
With over 30 Years of Experience, 200+ Airline Placements and 2 Convenient Locations, Flight Academy Australia is the flight school for you.

Name: Cambridge Gliding Centre
Description: Since 1935, we’ve taught thousands of people how to fly, and we’ve helped them enjoy the spectacular sport of gliding.

Name: Flight Ventures Aviation Academy
Description:
Flight Ventures Aviation Academy was founded on the belief that flight training should reflect real-world experience and not just what’s required legally to become a pilot.  We have crafted a program that incorporates real-world conditions and experiences so our students leave us with the highest skill sets we can provide.

Our campus and hangar is adjacent to the French Valley Airport in Murrieta CA,  which means more time spent learning. We feature a 2-story campus, comprised of 4,500 square feet of classroom space and 12,000 square feet of hangar space.

We offer a full set of FAR Part 61 pilot training courses and options for both Rotor and Fixed students, including private, commercial, instrument, CFI, CFII, ATP, add-ons, a helicopter flight simulator, and advanced flight training.

Our fleet consists of new state-of-the-art aircraft with the latest avionics and glass panels from Garmin and Dynon, and includes Cruiser Aircraft Sport Cruisers, Diamond DA42 planes, Robinson R-44 Raven II Helicopters, Guimbal Cabri G2 Helicopters, Aerocopter Ak1-3 and the Cicare SVH4 Helicopter Flight Trainer.

We are the only flight school in the USA that has the Cicare SVH-4 trainer helicopter and school authorized by the FAA to use the helicopter in flight training and log the time as actual flight time.  Using the Cicare full motion Helicopter Flight Trainer allows our students to gain the fundamentals of helicopter operations in a safe, controlled environment.  Students can use all flight controls including lift off to a normal hover of 3 AGL and hover taxing.

Contact us to set up a discovery flight and learn how Flight Ventures can help you achieve and live your aviation dreams.

Name: Merseyflight Ltd
Description: Merseyflight Air Training School is a UK Civil Aviation Authority approved flight training organisation based at Hawarden Aerodrome near Chester, UK.

Name: AVIATION PIONEERS ACADEMY
Description:
Aviation Pioneers since 2006 is dedicated to providing students and customers the best place for opting various courses and buying various kind of aviation supplies, books and accessories with ease with all the suggestive help from our sales staff and academic coordinators.
Our GACA approved academy trained and assisted hundreds of people who achieved their careers in the aviation field. 
The unique Pilot Shop provides high quality aviation products and supplies which covers all the needs of the commercial airlines, private aviation, aviation academies and aviation staff.
Aviation Pioneers have a huge community of Aviators who love to change the world with us and help each other succeed.

Name: Flycastles
Description:
Flycastles conducts CPL Classes with "Guaranteed Passing" through Live interactive sessions. We are the only one in India who offers "Blind Admission" means it doesn't matter how rich or poor you are and we can offer upto 100% Scholarship once your application is accepted. We are the only one in India who is having "DGCA Exam exact Replica" for practice.

India's Only 100% Passing RateAviation Academy.

Name: Drone Safety
Description: Drone Safety ist Ihr Partner für Drohnensystemlösungen und Schulungen. Wir sind ein Drohnen-Schulungszentrum und zertifizierte Stelle für den Drohnenführerschein (A2 Remote Pilot License). Neben theoretischen und praktischen Schulungen für Drohnenpiloten im Bereich Industrie, BOS und Gewerbe, bieten wir Beratung und Beschaffung die Implementierung maßgeschneiderter Drohnenlösungen in Geschäftsprozesse an.

Name: DroneTRUST
Description: DroneTRUST has trained over 65,000 people, in countries all around the world. We are trusted by the FAA to deliver the FAA TRUST course, and we work closely with regulators in Pacific Countries (New Zealand, Fiji, Vanuatu, Solomons, PNG, etc.) to deliver world-class online courses which you can do at your own pace, at your place.  Try one of our industry-leading courses today!

Name: FLEXSIM-ATO
Description:
FLEXSIM-ATO is an organization dedicated to the training of airline pilots, approved by the French Authority (DGAC FR.ATO.0240).
We offer different training solutions adapted to your needs.
Our vision of training and our educational approach place at the heart of our commitments your success in training and flight safety!
As FLEXSIM offer a wide range of training courses, we have a solution for your pilot training needs.
All our staff members work supportively and constructively together to carry out personal training programs in which student will earn a pilot's license (Type rating) or other aviation certificate (MCC, SFI).
Developing programs for pilots and instructors through harmonized systems of competencies,Flexsim contribute to improve quality of training, enhance safety and increase training efficiency.

Name: SharpeAero
Description: SharpeAero's mission is to make flight training easier and faster for student pilots and flight instructors in Canada. We believe that flight training resources should be kept as simple as possible, lending to our easy to understand content and minimalist diagrams. And since SharpeAero focuses on the practical aspects of flight training rather than diving deep into theory, our flight training resources are concise and easy to absorb.

Name: ASTA AVIATION International Academy
Description:
ASTA Aviation International Academy is an aviation academy which offers advanced aviation Diploma, Aviation certification training programmes, an Initial aviation training programme (CALLED AVIATION FOR TEENAGERS) and professional aeroplane and helicopter pilot training programmes. ASTA AVIATION equally offers Navy pilot (NAVAL AVIATOR) entrance preparatory classes to students who are seating for U.S.  navy pilot (Naval Aviator) entrance examination. 
ASTA AVIATION International Academy is an approved training organization (ATO) approved by Cameroon Civil Aviation Authority (CCAA) and Ministry Vocational Training, employment (MINEFOP), America Aviation Academy (AAA), Federal Aviation Administration FAA (in joint-Venture in her flight training programmes) and EASA (in joint-Venture in her flight training programmes). ASTA Aviation International Academy is an examination Centre approved and recognized by the state government. 
In addition to the aviation professional training program, ASTA Aviation International Academy also has an initial aviation training programme at the primary and secondary school levels to integrate solutions to both national and international aviation and aeronautic communities. We, therefore, promote aviation for children at an early age, giving everyone the chance to be prepared for the next generation of air transport professions and highly rewarding careers.

Name: Semper Fly Helicopters
Description: Semper Fly Helicopters is a premier, female veteran-owned helicopter flight school based at Max Westheimer Airport in Norman, Oklahoma. Founded by Marine veterans Brandi Rector and Michael Sanford, the school is dedicated to providing exceptional pilot training with a strong emphasis on safety, professionalism, and community. Specializing in training on the Cabri Guimbal G2, Semper Fly partners with The University of Oklahoma to offer aviation students top-tier instruction and provides tailored military-to-civilian transition programs. With a team of veteran instructors and a mission to cultivate skilled, confident pilots, Semper Fly stands as a leader in the helicopter aviation industry.

Name: Talulah
Description:
Talulah is a software platform designed to transform aviation education by making flight training more efficient, personalized, and accessible. We’re building an end-to-end system that supports both students and instructors throughout the entire learning journey, from the first ground school session to final checkrides.

Talulah offers a structured training pipeline that integrates:

Pre-flight preparation with intelligent lesson planning, weather/risk awareness prompts, and aircraft-specific checklists.

In-flight evaluation tools for instructors to document performance in real-time and provide instant feedback based on FAA standards.

Post-flight debriefing with analytics, video/audio playback integration, and progress tracking tied to student goals.

The platform will evolve to include scheduling, certification tracking, mentorship matching, community forums, and partnerships with flight schools and sponsors, making Talulah not just a learning tool but an aviation career hub.

Our long-term mission is to address the global pilot shortage by empowering the next generation of pilots with the tools, knowledge, and support to succeed in aviation. We believe the future of flight is diverse, data-driven, and deeply human.

Talulah is currently in its early development phase, but the vision is clear: Help people take flight, literally and figuratively.

Name: 744 Experience Ltd
Description: An advanced and immersive Boeing 747-400 fixed base Flight Simulator and Upper Deck Experience, utilising large sections of the retired British Airways Boeing 747 fleet. Three years in the planning and engineering and using only original equipment. A B747 flight simulator built by professionals, for enthusiasts and professionals alike. As close to a certified full flight simulator as we can make it.

Name: Susi Flying School
Description: Susi Flying School is a premier flight academy in Indonesia, dedicated to training the next generation of professional pilots through ICAO-compliant programs including PPL, CPL, and IR. With modern facilities, experienced instructors, and an all-inclusive training package covering accommodation, meals, and student resources, we ensure a world-class learning experience. Graduates complete 209 flight hours and 47 simulator hours, and receive priority consideration for recruitment with Susi Air, one of Indonesia’s leading airlines.

Name: Flying Green Academy
Description:
Flying Green Academy est une école de pilotage de nouvelle génération, située à Auxerre en Bourgogne. Première école de pilotes de ligne à allier formation de haute qualité et démarche écoresponsable, notre académie forme des professionnels prêts à répondre aux défis de l’aviation moderne.

Une formation d’exception, inspirée des compagnies aériennes
Chez Flying Green Academy, nous appliquons des standards d'excellence issus des meilleures pratiques du secteur aéronautique, pour offrir une formation aussi rigoureuse qu’efficace. Chaque étudiant bénéficie d'un encadrement personnalisé, visant à maximiser ses compétences techniques, son adaptabilité, et son efficacité en vol.

Une démarche écoresponsable authentique
Conscients de l’impact environnemental de l’aviation, nous adoptons une approche progressive et mesurée vers la durabilité. 

Nos engagements et points forts :
 Pratiques de formation responsables : Adoption de technologies éco-optimisées et sensibilisation des futurs pilotes à l'écopilotage.
 Gestion inspirée de l’aviation commerciale : Structure et organisation des formations selon des méthodes éprouvées, pour une transition réussie vers l’aviation commerciale.
 Réseau de l’industrie : Soutenue par des professionnels de l’aviation, Flying Green Academy bénéficie d'un réseau solide, offrant des opportunités pour l’avenir de nos diplômés.
 Excellence pédagogique : Une équipe d’instructeurs expérimentés, des simulateurs modernes et des partenariats stratégiques.

Pourquoi nous choisir ?
Flying Green Academy offre bien plus qu’une formation technique. Nos étudiants acquièrent une préparation opérationnelle complète et une sensibilité à l'impact environnemental qui les différencie dans un secteur en pleine transformation. Grâce à une équipe dirigeante expérimentée et reconnue, notre école est gérée avec le même niveau d’exigence qu’une compagnie aérienne, garantissant une expérience de formation professionnelle, fiable et de grande qualité.

Name: DRONE EDUTECH INDONESIA
Description: Drone Edutech Indonesia merupakan pusat pelatihan Pesawat Udara Tanpa Awak pertama di Indonesia UASTC-001 yang berfokus pada pelatihan kompetensi pilot Pesawat Udara Tanpa Awak dan pengembangan sumber daya manusia untuk menjadi profesional di industri penerbangan.

Name: Camarillo Flight Instruction
Description: Full-service Part 61 flight school at Camarillo Airport.

Name: L'Happynous: conférences, stand-up, stratégie de communication, gestion du stress
Description: Découvrez la méthode @lhappynous pour une communication et une gestion du stress adaptée à vos besoins

Name: Mike Holman Foundation
Description: In memory of our colleague and friend Mike Holman the foundation trust will award and manage an annual scholarship to provide and pay for Helicopter Technical Crew (Rear crew) Training for Hoist & other Advanced Operations to those who would otherwise not have the opportunity to secure that training through education or employment.

Name: AGIL ASSO KONSEIL
Description:
Agil Asso Konseil est un organisme de formation pour les dirigeants associatifs.

L'organisme est certifié Qualiopi

Nos formations aux associations et aux structures de l'économie sociale et solidaire portent sur les thèmes suivants :

- Comptabilité des associations
- Budget prévisionnel des associations
- Modèle socio-économique des associations
- Élaboration du projet associatif
- Élaboration de plan stratégique
- Formation à la gestion financière de l'association
- Formation et accompagnement à la recherche de financement

Les formations sont proposées en intra donc sur mesure et également en inter-structure.

Notre objectif est de vous donner les moyens de prendre des décisions éclairées, de donner une direction claire à votre association.

Toutes les formations sont finançables pour les salariés avec votre opérateur de compétences OPCO.

Name: Parsis Aviation Training Center
Description:
Welcome to Parsis Aviation Training Center (PATC)! 

Established in 2010 by the visionary leadership of Ahmed Rahmani (Chairman of the Board of Directors) and the late pilot Majid Yousefi Mehr (CEO), PATC is a premier institution dedicated to training and developing specialized human resources in the aviation industry. 

At PATC, we offer a comprehensive range of ground and flight courses, including Private Pilot License (PPL), Commercial Pilot License (CPL), Instrument Rating (IR), and Flight Instructor (FI) programs. Our courses are meticulously designed to equip aspiring pilots with the knowledge, skills, and expertise needed to excel in their aviation careers. 

With the approval and support of the Civil Aviation Organization, we are proud to contribute to the privatization of aviation education and facilitate the growth of this dynamic sector. Our primary objective is to prepare experienced flight staff for airlines, fostering job creation opportunities within the aviation industry. 

Join us at Parsis Aviation Training Center, where we are committed to shaping the future of aviation and empowering the next generation of pilots. Explore the limitless skies with us! 

#parsisaviation #parsis #patc #aviationtraining #pilottraining #flightcourses #privatelicence #commerciallicence #instrumentrating #flightinstructor #civilaviation #jobopportunities #aviationeducation #futureofaviation #empoweringpilots #limitlessskies #aviationindustry

Name: GreenBees Helico
Description: Il y a 25 ans Michel de Rohozinski, spécialiste du pilotage sur Robinson, fonde à Cannes AZUR HELICOPTERE qui deviendra leader de la formation pilote privée et professionnelle en France. Fort de sa réputation et de son professionnalisme, AZUR HELICOPTERE laisse la place à Cannes au tout nouveau centre de formation GREENBEES HELICOPTERE où ses équipes expérimentées ont le plaisir de vous accueillir à l'aéroport de Cannes Mandelieu.

Name: K-aircraft Jets & Props, Inh. Klaus Kuehl
Description:
Experience and expertise in aircraft trading!

At K-aircraft Jets & Props we have been engaged in aircraft trading since 1993, successfully operating our own business since 2003. Benefit from our experience if you are thinking about selling your aircraft or if you are looking for a new plane that fits your company’s needs. Check out our website where we regularly offer approximately 30 used aircraft! Here’s where you will find detailed specifications and pin sharp images for each aircraft offered for sale.
Ferry flights to and from destinations around the globe and check rides round off our service profile.

Take a look at our own website: www.K-aircraft.de

You will find us at facebook, too: https://www.facebook.com/kaircraft

Imprint: http://www.k-aircraft.de/html/imprint.html

Name: Piloto Completo
Description:
O nome Piloto Completo tem base no conceito em inglês Airmanship. Como o termo não possui uma tradução direta, foi preciso contextualizar isso em palavras que pudessem trazer o mesmo significado, importância e compreensão.

Sendo assim, este espaço existe para ampliar o repertório técnico e humano do aviador. Entendemos que a constante evolução do piloto é fundamental para o desenvolvimento da aviação como um todo, principalmente no aspecto segurança.

Embora o piloto seja a figura central de nossos conteúdos, queremos envolver todos os profissionais e entusiastas de aviação. Acreditamos que a formação de uma melhor cultura aeronáutica começa nos pilotos, mas precisa ser percebida e entendida por todos.

Referencial Técnico Internacional

Abordamos os assuntos fundamentais à formação de aviadores de excelência, tendo como referência as oito competências ICAO referendadas pela IATA para pilotos de aviões:

Aplicação de Procedimentos e Cumprimento da Regulamentação
Comunicação
Gerenciamento da Trajetória de Voo (com automação)
Gerenciamento da Trajetória de Voo (voo manual)
Liderança e Trabalho em Equipe
Resolução de Problemas e Tomada de Decisão
Consciência Situacional e Gerenciamento de Informação
Gerenciamento da Carga de Trabalho

Quer saber mais? Acesse www.pilotocompleto.com.br

Name: Queen City Flying Service
Description: We're a new flight school with an old name from Cincinnati's aviation heritage. As a collection of independent flight instructors, we are far from the typical atmosphere of aviation training. We're committed to our clients' success, not just logging time until we can move on to the next job. The airplanes are accessible 24/7, available for rental whenever our clients desire to fly.

Name: Flylink Aviation College
Description: Flylink Aviation College is an Australia Civil Aviation Safety Authority (CASA) Part 141 Approved Training Organization based at Archerfield. FAC was established to provide Pilot training primarily for aspiring Professional Pilots (up to CPL MEAIR / Frozen ATPL) as well as for persons keen on recreational flying (up to RPL / RPL Nav / PPL). FAC also trains Flight Instructors and indeed many of its own current pool of Flight Instructors were trained in-house.

Name: Airline Flight Academy
Description:
Founded in 1998 on the initiative of professionals from the aviation’s world, the Airline Flight Academy (AFA) provides to airlines and aerospace companies the skills they need through theoretical and practical training.
It is the unique school offering as broad and comprehensive set of training and activities related to aviation and in particular the air transport industry in Africa.

Name: Flightpath Training Ltd
Description: Flightpath Training Ltd provides both physical and digital training for ATOs and individuals. The company owns several brands including The A320 Lounge and The 737 Lounge and runs their associated podcasts. We are always looking to expand our workforce with flight and ground school instructors. Please get in touch if you think you could bring something to our organisation.

Name: Redemption Air Academy
Description: Redemption Air Academy is a specialized flight instruction company founded by Hunter Bernal, focused on Upset Prevention and Recovery Training (UPRT) and Spin Prevention and Recovery Training (SPRT). Our mission is to enhance aviation safety by providing advanced training designed to prepare pilots for and help them recover from unexpected in-flight situations. Utilizing cutting-edge aircraft and experienced instructors, we aim to establish ourselves as a leading authority in aviation safety training.

Name: National Flight Simulator
Description:
National Flight Simulator is a state-of-the-art aviation training center for pilots located in Manchester, New Hampshire (MHT). We provide both initial training and recurrent training. We are the only insurance company approved simulator-based training center in New England. Nashua Flight Simulator utilizes FAA approved FTDs to fulfill insurance mandated annual training in cabin class piston twins, turbo prop twins, high performance single engine and turbo prop single engine aircraft.

Owner and operator, Stephen Cunningham brings comprehensive aviation experience and business acumen to Nashua Flight Simulator, the Northeast’s premier simulator-based training center he founded in 2006.
At Nashua Flight Simulator, we credit our success to the combination of top-of-the-line flight simulator equipment and old-fashioned personal service. Tailored to meet the customized needs of the pilot and the aircraft flown. Our instructors are seasoned aviators, with extensive teaching experience. Because each aircraft is unique, we ensure our instructors have significant hands-on flying time in the particular make and model they teach.

We pride ourselves providing a concierge level experience to our clients. For example, we provide pilots with a courtesy crew car and assistance with hotel accommodations to ensure your travel is hassle-free.  Nashua Flight Simulator and its staff of experienced instructors are widely regarded by our clients as the best flight training available on the ground.

When you are ready to step up to the next level of aircraft complexity, we're here to make it happen for you. Our staff will go the extra mile to make sure that your training program is approved and accepted by your insurance provider. 

Best of all, our scenic, four season southern New Hampshire destination can't be beat. Come experience our hospitality first hand. Call us to schedule your training today! Call Steve at 866-505-0077.

Name: GoFly Aviation
Description:
GoFly Aviation on the Sunshine Coast (Qld, Australia), offers recreational and navigation flight training, as well as RAAus Instructor Training.

AWESOME PRICING
Our low hourly cost includes briefings, exams and online videos
AWESOME SLING AIRCRAFT
We conduct flight training in beautiful glass-cockpit Sling trainers, maintained to the highest standards by Aircraft Maintenance Services (AMS) situated next door to us.
AWESOME INSTRUCTORS
Highly experienced Instructors who take flying seriously but not themselves seriously!
CUSTOMISED LEARNING
We will create a flying program to suit your work/life balance
GOFLY ONLINE LESSONS
Our award-winning flight training platform contains pilot courses, theory books, pilot practice exams, free resources: www.gofly.online

Name: CATS Aviation Training Academy
Description:
CATS Aviation Training Academy is a CAAZ-approved ATO established in March 2024 with a singular mission: to provide world-class aviation training to aspiring pilots in Zimbabwe and beyond.

We uphold rigorous training standards, setting ourselves apart as a premier aviation school in Africa and globally. Our commitment to excellence extends to fostering a positive learning environment that emphasizes continuous improvement and a passion for aviation.

We believe the sky is not the limit but a gateway to endless possibilities. If you aspire to become the best pilot you can be, we are dedicated to guiding you on your journey to success.

Name: FHATO Flight Training Center
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de FHATO – L’école de pilotage d’hélicoptère du groupe HBG.

Chez FHATO, nous offrons des programmes de formation de haute qualité pour les pilotes professionnels et privés.
Que vous aspiriez à devenir pilote professionnel ou à explorer le ciel par plaisir, nos programmes de formation sont conçus pour répondre à vos besoins. Nos instructeurs qualifiés vous guideront à travers chaque étape du processus, vous assurant une formation complète et de qualité.
 Toutes nos formations sont certifiées QUALIOPI.

Name: Aeroclube de Lavras
Description: Formador de pilotos por tradição, o Aeroclube de lavras vem há mais de 80 anos treinando jovens para exercer a profissão de aviadores ou praticar a aviação desportiva como lazer. Nossos princípios de treinamento são baseados na segurança operacional, oferecendo ao aluno um treinamento consistente, de forma que ao concluí-lo, este esteja apto a conduzir uma aeronave sozinho em segurança.Muito além de "checar pilotos", formamos aviadores com capacidade de tomar decisões em voo e reagir a situações de emergência com perícia e calma. Nosso objetivo é tornar nossos alunos reais aviadores, nos quais possamos confiar a operação de nossas aeronaves em voos solos.Atualmente oferecemos os seguintes cursos para formação de pilotos profissionais e desportivos.

Name: Advanced Flight Controls
Description: Based in Montreal, Quebec, our Canadian flight and helicopter simulation company specializes in building customizable platforms designed for seamless integration with a wide array of peripherals. This unique approach allows us to create a more immersive and dynamic training experience across various simulator types, including flight, helicopter, and even tank simulators. A key differentiator of our platforms is the advanced integration of haptics and motion technology, which delivers lifelike tactile feedback, ultimately providing unparalleled realism for a truly effective training environment.

Name: Planorámica Drones
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la formación de cursos oficiales de piloto de drones y otros cursos de especialización dentro del sector de los drones.
Contamos con servicios de asesoría y gestión aeronáutica para la obtención de todo tipo de permisos y coordinaciones, además de realizar servicios aéreos de todo tipo a nivel nacional.

Name: Mentora Finance
Description:
Ensemble, maîtrisons les fondamentaux de la gestion financière
en transformant votre approche des chiffres.

Mentora Finance propose des formations simples, à impact, adaptées à votre entreprise. En présentiel ou en ligne, dépassez les défis de la comptabilité, de la fiscalité, du pilotage financier et des stratégies de développement.

Nos formations s’appuient sur les chiffres réels de votre activité pour une mise en application concrète et immédiate. Votre entreprise est unique, nos programmes vous assurent des fondations financières solides et structurées.

Grâce à notre mentorat collectif et individuel, bénéficiez d’un accompagnement d’experts, d’une entraide entrepreneuriale précieuse, de conseils sur mesure afin d’accompagner la transformation pérenne de votre entreprise.

Name: Public Safety UAS
Description:
PSU is an organization of active public safety members with decades of public safety and aviation experience. Our goal at PS UAS is to offer state-of-the-art, current, customized training for federal, state, and local public safety organizations.

With a focus on operational excellence and safety, our expert instructors train and guide participants through the latest UAS technologies, regulations, and best practices. Our mission is to equip your team with the skills needed to effectively deploy UAS technology, ensuring that you can respond more efficiently, safely, and effectively to emergencies and public safety challenges.

We are here to train future professional sUAS pilots to become expert leaders to help their agency succeed. Check out of Facebook for cross posting and reviews! Public Safety UAS Institute

Name: Coastal Pacific Aviation
Description:
Welcome to Coastal Pacific Aviation, a leading provider of aviation education and training since 1973.

As a premier flight school, Coastal Pacific Aviation has earned a reputation for excellence in aviation training, with a focus on providing our students with the best possible education and instruction. We offer a wide range of programs designed to meet the needs of aspiring pilots at all levels, from novice to advanced.

Our history is one of innovation and collaboration, with a pioneering program that combined flight training with academic instruction, resulting in a joint venture agreement with the University of the Fraser Valley (UFV) in 1979. Since then, we have continued to build on our legacy of excellence, producing hundreds of successful pilots who work at all levels of the aviation industry.

At Coastal Pacific Aviation, we believe that our success is defined by the success of our students. That's why we are committed to providing our students with the latest technology, instructional techniques, and resources they need to thrive in the aviation industry. Our mission is to help our students achieve their goals and reach new heights in their aviation careers.

Our team of experienced and dedicated instructors is committed to providing our students with personalized attention and support. We are passionate about aviation and dedicated to helping our students achieve their dreams.

Name: Havacılık ve Uzay Bilimleri Eğitim Kurumları HUBEK
Description: Havacılık ve Uzay Bilimleri Eğitim Kurumları HUBEK, 2022 yılında hızlı büyüyen havacılık sektöründe artan nitelikli pilot ihtiyacını karşılamak için kurulmuş bir kuruluştur.

Name: UPRT-USA
Description: Provides professional Upset Prevention and Recovery Training.

Name: Escuela de Piloto de Drones
Description:
En Escuela Pilotos de Drones somos una entidad reconocida por AESA para impartir formación a nuevos pilotos de drones en categoría específica STS-1 y STS-2. 
Nuestros cursos son impartidos por Pilotos profesionales con una dilatada experiencia en el sector aeronáutico.

Realizando nuestro curso podrás realizar vuelos en diferentes sectores , estando acreditado por nuestros instructores reconocidos por AESA.

-Fotografía, filmaciones y levantamientos aéreos.
-Publicidad aérea y grabación de eventos. 
-Observación y vigilancia aérea, incluyendo la forestal y de incendios.
-Operaciones de emergencia, búsqueda y salvamento.
-Investigación y desarrollo.
-Meteorología.
-Investigación y reconocimiento instrumental.
-Geolocalización.
-Uso militar.
-Telecomunicaciones.

Name: Flight Brasil Escola de Aviação Civil
Description: A Escola Flight Brasil de Aviação Civil Ltda fundada em 2007 tem como objetivo a formação e qualificação de profissionais para atuarem em solo nos aeroportos e como tripulantes técnicos e comerciais.

Formations en leadership et posture managériale

 Conférences inspirantes & ateliers interactifs
