Name: TURIN FLYING ACADEMY
Description:
Il centro di formazione aeronautico IT.ATO.0017 riconosciuto a livello europeo secondo la normativa EASA.
All'interno dell’aeroporto internazionale di Torino Caselle forma figure professionali nel comparto dell’aviazione.

Name: iHelo Suisse Sagl
Description:
Aviation multi-service agency in Milan, Italy.
Service of a freelance ground instructor, content manager, technical writer and translation coordinator for your Aviation Training.

Name: Albacore FT
Description: Established in Johannesburg, Albacore FT is a premier flight training institution dedicated to providing outstanding foundational flight to recreational pilots and those pursuing an entry- level career in commercial aviation. Through state-of-the-art equipment, a dedicated team , and a passion for aviation, we equip our students with the necessary skills to soar the skies.

Name: Falcon Academy AB
Description:
Ladies and Gentlemen this is your Captain speaking.

Hos oss får alla en möjlighet att prova på att flyga. Vi erbjuder upplevelser som passar alla. Barn som vuxen, erfaren eller fullständig nybörjare.

Kom och flyg med oss! Se om du har vad som krävs för att flyga ett kommersiellt jetflygplan. Vår fullskaliga flygsimulator är en B737-800, ett av de mest använda flygplanen idag, flugna av såväl Norwegian som Ryanair.

Är du flygintresserad, vill lära sig flyga, nyfiken eller letar efter den perfekta födelsedagspresenten? Med ett antal skräddarsydda flygupplevelser har vi något för alla. Prova på att flyga, starta och landa, med ett 30 min Prova på Pass. Eller varför inte bli pilot för en dag? Vi har 120 eller 180 min upplevelser där du blir Pilot för en dag. Pilot for a Day, vårt längsta och mest detaljerade pass ger dig möjlighet att för en dag få bli Kapten på ett passagerarflygplan.

Är du själv intresserad av hur det är att flyga eller funderar på att bli pilot? Trött på tråkiga presenter?
Detta är den perfekta gåvan, inte bara för den blivande piloten utan för alla. En upplevelse som kommer uppskattas. Våra presentkort har visat sig vara en mycket uppskattad present.

Vi har stora fina lokaler som passar perfekt även för större grupper och företag eller kompisgänget.
Dags för nästa företagsevent, kickoff eller varför inte en spontan AW? Vem i gruppen kan landa en Boeing 737?

Är du kanske en av många därute som inte alls tycker att det är så kul att flyga? Du är inte ensam. Vi erbjuder kurser för den flygrädda. Tillsammans med utbildad pilot och tidigare flygrädda går vi igenom de olika momenten under flygning, samt provar på tillsammans i flygsimulatorn. Flygrädsla är i de flesta fall en fråga om kunskap. Vi har många års erfarenhet i branschen och finns här för att svara på alla dina frågor.

Du kanske redan är pilot eller på god väg att bli? Här kan du öva och träna inför kommande arbetsintervju eller uppflygning.

Name: Norwich Aviation Centre Ltd
Description:
NAC provides elite flight training services to the aviation industry. We train people to follow their dreams in aviation with a student and customer focused approach to training.

We are at the forefront of seeing a change to the way students finance their training so as to protect their investment in their future aviation goals..

Name: Flugskóli Íslands / Icelandic Aviation Training
Description:
Flugskóli Íslands / Icelandic Aviation Training is an EASA Approved Training Organization (ATO) located in Reykjavik Iceland offering various training to airlines and individuals. Established by highly experienced airline captains and training personnel with more than 30 years experience in the field.
We offer highly standardized Integrated ATPL (in partnership with Sevenair Academy in Portugal), APS MCC training in state of the art full flight simulators (FFS), and type rating training through various partnerships with various FFS Centers throughout Europe. Our type rating training focuses primary on B737 300-900, B737-8 MAX, B757-200W and B767-300ER. 

Courses and programs we offer include 
Integrated ATPL 
MCC 
APS MCC
B737 -8 (MAX) Return To Service (RTS) Training
B737 300-900 Type Rating
Boeing 737 CL/NG and NG/MAX Differences Training
Boeing 757/767 Type Rating
Boeing 757/767 Differences Training
King Air B200 Type Rating
Viking Twin Otter DHC-6-300 Type Rating
Recurrent - Revalidation - Renewal
LPCs / OPCs / OCC Training and Checking
ATPL Skill Test
Various airline specific courses.

Don't hesitate to reach out to us if you have any questions about our courses.

Name: 𝘍𝘓𝘠𝙔𝙐𝙍𝙀𝙆𝙇𝙄
Description: 2017 yılında Bursa Yunuseli Havaalanında hizmete başlayan firmamız, genel havacılık, Ultralight tipi hava araçları segmentinde, pilotaj eğitimlerinden, uçak satışına, danışmanlık hizmetlerine kadar müşterilerine ilgili ve güleryüzlü hizmetler sunmaktadır. Mutlu müşterilerimiz, bizim kanat dostlarımızdır.

Name: EFT - Euro Flight Training
Description:
We are an approved DTO and ATO flying school based in Hampshire, UK, approved by the UK CAA.

As well as offering training for the PPL and LAPL, we are approved to offer training for the Instrument Rating (single and multi engine, also CB IR) as well as multi engine class ratings and CPL courses.

Both our single engine and multi engine Diamond simulators are fully FNPT II approved and can be used for all your training requirements from approved training to refresher sessions, familiarisation and differences training or the revalidation of ratings.

We have experienced instructors , modern aircraft and a welcoming purpose built facility.

Please get in touch if you wish to discuss your training needs and we will be happy to go through the options with you.

Name: THK Flight Academy - THK Uçuş Akademisi - TUA
Description:
Türk Hava Kurumu bünyesinde gerçekleştirilen yeniden yapılanma faaliyetleri kapsamında kurulan "THK Uçuş Akademisi"; Sivil Havacılık mevzuatına uygun, nitelik, etkinlik, emniyet ve standardizasyonu ön planda tutan bir anlayışla, Sivil Havacılık sektörünün ihtiyaç duyduğu pilotları yetiştirme görevini üstlenmiştir.

Türkiye’de sivil havacılığın geliştirilmesi ve gençlerin havacılığa kazandırılması ile ilgili 86 yıldan bu yana faaliyetlerini sürdüren Türk Hava Kurumu, geleceğin pilotlarını Ankara ve İzmir'de hali hazırda faaliyet gösteren THK Uçuş Eğitim okullarında yetiştiriyor.

Geleceğin ve Bugünün Mesleği İçin En Doğru Tercih
THK Uçuş Eğitim Okulu mezunları aldıkları bilgi ve deneyim ile Hava Yollarında başarılı uçuşlar gerçekleştirmektedirler. Geleceğin ve bugünün mesleği için en doğru tercih THK Uçuş okullarıdır. Kariyeriniz THK Uçuş Eğitim Okulları ile emin ellerdedir…

THK Uçuş Eğitim Okulu, deneyimli öğretmenleri ve çağdaş eğitim ekipmanları ile eğitim boyunca sizlere en kaliteli hizmeti vermek için çalışmaktadır.

Name: Polish Aviation Academy
Description: The Polish Aviation Academy is the largest aviation training center in Poland. We offer comprehensive aviation training using the latest technologies. Thanks to our experienced staff and knowledge gained from airlines, we offer training in ab inito, Type Ratings and Cabin Crew courses for pilots. We are a place where your crews will receive the highest level of training.

Name: شركة اجنحة الطيران للتدريب
Description: أجنحة الطيران هي شركة سعودية أسست بهدف توفير حلول لتدريب الطيران بأقل التكاليف داخل السعودية وخارجها ويأتي ذلك عن طريق الإشراف والمتابعة الحثيثة مع اكثر من 100 مركز تدريب طيران حول العالم، ليصبح مجال دراسة الطيران مجال في متناول كل محب وهاوِ، لا سيما أن هذا المجال بدأ بالتنامي في السعودية بوتيرة متسارعة انطلاقاً من رؤية 2030، ولنسهم بذلك في أن يكونوا ابنائنا وبناتنا الطيارين السعوديين هم المستفيد الأول من نمو سوق الطيران في المملكة.

Name: Aamro Aviation
Description: Aamro aviation was born out of passion for flying. A childhood dream of Mr. Murali Nair that came true at the age of 58 when he got his pilot wings. His vision of imparting quality flight training to prospective students who dream of a career in aviation or just to fly a plane took shape in 2016 with 4 Diamond Aircrafts. Now we have more than 14 aircrafts and operate out of two airports and have a proud alumni of 500+ students.

Name: Fenix UAS
Description: Fenix UAS is New Zealand’s leading drone training and consultancy provider. Our expert team drawn from aviation, military, and regulatory backgrounds - delivers nationally recognised CAA Part 141 courses across NZ and the Pacific. We provide Advanced Remote Pilot Certificates, Night and Agricultural Ratings, SMS training, and bespoke corporate programmes. Trusted by individuals, companies, and government agencies, we set the standard for safe, compliant, and professional unmanned aviation.

Name: Dérive Pilotage
Description:
Dérive Pilotage est une école de pilotage automobile itinérante, fondée par des moniteurs diplômés BPJEPS, expérimentés et surtout passionnés.

Nous sommes basés en région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, et nous couvrons une grande partie de la France afin de proposer des stages sur un maximum de circuits.

Nous organisons tout au long de l’année, des stages dédiés à la conduite sur circuit et à l’apprentissage de la glisse.

Name: Heli Solution
Description: Make your dreams about flying helicopters come true!

Name: Pilot Training System
Description: As the world's largest network of collegiate flight schools, Pilot Training System offers career-pathway programs for aspiring professional aviators at colleges across the United States. Visit PilotTrainingSystem.com to learn more and to enroll in our FREE eLearning for student pilots to prepare for FAA written exams for Private Pilot and/or a Commercial Drone Pilot licenses.

Name: On-Track Aviation Limited
Description:
On-Track Aviation has developed into a nationally and internationally well respected EASA Approved Training Organisation (ATO) and has a reputation amongst students for first class training with an above average first time pass rate. Indeed, all the students who have graduated from On-Track’s courses have quickly gained positions as either flight instructors or pilots within the airline industry. We have regular contact with many flying schools and clubs throughout the UK who enquire about our instructor graduates. 

Our headquarters is located at Wellesbourne in Warwickshire, UK and our aircraft are all leased and include Cessna 152/172s, PA18/28/34s, T67M Firefly, Robin 200/2160s, DA42, Cessna 172 Amphibian, Christen Eagle II. With such a wide choice of aeroplanes we are sure to have one that you are familiar with thus enabling your chosen course to run more effectively. 

The On-Track Aviation team are a mixture of full and part time personnel and include both Flight Instructors and Examiners. Their backgrounds range from military, airlines, commercial schools and the CAA. In addition to having many years of instructing and examining experience, we can therefore also offer you first hand advice on all aspects of a professional pilot career.

Name: Zephyr Drone Simulator
Description: We offer a scalable UAS simulation platform featuring a robust Learning Management System focused on elevating your training!

Name: DroneAviate UAS Group, LLC
Description: DroneAviate provides expert commercial UAS remote pilot training. With our highly experienced instructor staff, we are California’s premier drone pilot training educator committed to the highest level of integrity, service, safety, and excellence. Our successful programs, with an emphasis on remote pilot career development, seek to provide some of the highest commercial remote pilot career placement rates in the industry.

Name: Axiale
Description:
Axiale est un organisme de formation spécialisé dans les métiers du drone disposant de 3 centres : Le Soler (66), Solesmes (59) et Luçon (85). 

Son dirigeant Alexis Texier débute la prise de vue aérienne en juin 2007 par hélicoptère puis en drone depuis 2012. Parallèlement, il créé son premier centre de formation en mars 2010 dans les domaines de l’informatique et de l’audiovisuel. En mars 2017, il se lance dans l’aventure de la formation drone.
 
 “Nous formons de futurs pilotes de drone dont les missions sont destinées à la prise de vues audiovisuelles et techniques : photogrammétrie, thermographie, nettoyage de toitures et façades, inspection et sécurité publique.
Notre rôle est de les accompagner dans leurs activités et dans la réussite de leurs projets. Nous ne sommes ni des usurpateurs, ni des vendeurs de rêve. Le drone fait partie des secteurs innovants, en pleine croissance, mais rien ne s’improvise, il faut bien se préparer pour réussir dans ce domaine ou les activités qui y sont liées”.

Name: ecoflight.ch
Description:
ecoflight GmbH is an Aviation Training Organization with a certificate issued by the Swiss FOCA.
CH.ATO 0276

Five own single engine aircraft for a wide scope of programs for license and ratings training.
LAPL up to advUPRT

Partner of:
SPHAIR
ZHAW
Horizon Swiss Flight Academy
Fluggruppe Mollis

Name: LMQ TRAINING srl
Description: LMQ Training was created out of the Roberto Liotta’s idea combining the highest operational experience of a group of pilots and LMQ Ltd, experts in Training and Human Factors. The mixture of technical operational experience and psychological expertise generates the guarantee that LMQ Training offers the highest quality training in the aviation industry for those who approach our ATO. We offer Type Rating Courses A320/A330, Refresher Seminars TRI-SFI, Instructor Course TRI-SFI A320/A330, Revalidation & Renewals A320/A330 , CBTA Instructor Course/ EBT, Culture Change Programme and many more.

Name: HQ Aviation
Description:
Founded by world-renowned helicopter pilot Quentin “Q” Smith with over 55 years of experience (a lifetime).

HQ Aviation is an official Robinson Helicopter Dealer & Service Centre and is where London comes to fly.

Learn how to fly from the BEST!

Get in contact to embark on one of the best journeys of your life and for sales/maintenance inquiries.

Name: Contrail Aviation Ltd
Description:
Contrail Aviation Ltd is a new training organisation, specialising in advanced modular pilot training for private and professional pilots. The flying school has been formed by current airline Captain and Flight Examiner. We have partnered with JD Aviation Ltd 

The courses we will provide are:

Multi Engine Piston (MEP),

Instrument Rating, SE and ME (IR),

Competency Based Instrument Rating, SE and ME (CBIR)

Commercial Pilots License, SE and ME (CPL)

Name: Reykjavik Flight Academy
Description: At Reykjavik Flight Academy, we take pride in shaping the future of aviation by providing top-notch flight training and education. As Iceland's premier flight school, we offer comprehensive programs that blend cutting-edge technology, experienced instructors, and the stunning natural beauty of our unique location.

Name: EasyDrift Technology
Description:
L'idée initiale d'Easydrift était ambitieuse, avec des perspectives d'utilisation multiples. 

Aujourd'hui, le système a trouvé sa place dans le domaine crucial de la sécurité routière. Utilisé comme un outil de formation, Easydrift permet à chacun de maîtriser son véhicule dans des conditions d'adhérence limitée, sans compromettre la sécurité.

Name: FlyDushanbe
Description:
Transform Your Aviation Future with Specialized Training at FlyDushanbe 
Located in Dushanbe, Tajikistan, FlyDushanbe Aviation Training Center is recognized as one of the most reputable institutions in the aviation industry. By adhering to the latest ICAO and EASA standards, this center offers a range of theoretical and practical courses to train highly skilled aviation professionals.
 Our Training Programs Include:
 Pilot Training (PPL, CPL, IR and etc.) 
 Flight Attendant Courses focusing on safety, passenger services, and international communication
 Flight Dispatch and Operations Management Training with a comprehensive approach to flight planning and supervision
 Specialized Aircraft Maintenance Courses (B1 & B2) for professional aviation engineers
 General and Aviation English Training aligned with ICAO standards
 Enhance your skills and take the next step toward a successful career in aviation.

Name: Drone Crew
Description:
Drone Crew is a Portuguese registered brand founded in 2022, specialized in delivering advanced drone training programs for remote pilots operating within military, police, and first responder UAS (Unmanned Aerial Systems) teams. 

Our team is composed of highly experienced remote pilots from Portuguese security forces and firefighters, bringing decades of real-world military, law enforcement and emergency expertise to the training field. At Drone Crew, we understand the critical nature of tactical drone operations, which is why our programs are designed to prepare pilots for high-stakes missions. 

We offer specialized tactical drone piloting training for organizations, combining traditional classroom instruction with immersive, scenario-based tactical environments. This hybrid approach ensures our trainees are not only knowledgeable but also operationally ready for the dynamic challenges faced in the field. 

Drone Crew—Training today for tomorrow’s missions.

Name: Ground School
Description:
The best pilot exam preparation system available!

We provide the most up to date ground school courses and mock exams to get you through the official exams the first time!

Ground School has been created together with flight instructors that have an intimate knowledge of the syllabi as well as exactly how the questions are asked in the official exams – especially the tricky ones. Our courses and exams will ensure you pass the exams in record time with a full understanding of the content you are being tested on. We are the number one solution recommended by flight instructors and flight schools to assist you on your journey to becoming a pilot.

Whether you want to become a private pilot, commercial pilot, or airline transport pilot, we have the training material you need. Fixed-wing, helicopter, gyrocopter, or light-sport-aircraft, you name it - we’ve got it. We cover a wide range of licences and ratings to help you pass, no matter what type of aircraft you fly. If we do not have content for the exam you’re writing, please let us know so that we can get our subject matter experts working to include it!

Name: FlyBest Training Center
Description:
FlyBest Training Center (FBTC) is more than just a training facility — we are the launchpad for your aviation career.

As a DGCA Indonesia-approved Part-142 Training Center (Certificate No. 142D-28), we deliver airline-oriented pilot training that meets both national and international standards.

Our programs are designed for excellence, emphasizing Airbus A320 Type Rating training in full compliance with Airbus Flight Crew Training Program (FCTP). We provide 9 Full-Flight Simulator (FFS) sessions, MCC + JOT, and work closely with SIMAERO at their state-of-the-art training facility in Changsha, China.

Whether you're an aspiring airline pilot or transitioning to the A320, we combine high-quality instruction, advanced simulator technology, and real-world airline insight to ensure you're ready for the cockpit.

 Learn more at: https://trainingcenter.flybest.co.id

Name: AeroJet Training
Description:
Steve “Lambo” Lambert is a retired Air Force pilot providing ground school, initial and recurrent training, upset and recovery training and aerobatic training in the L-39 Albatross. AeroJet Training, founded by Karen and Steve Lambert, aims to provide professional, consistent training that is substantive without being punishing. We deliver a high level of quality customer experience to everything we do in a straightforward and friendly way providing training where it’s convenient for you. 

Aircraft pick-up and delivery is also available upon request.

Name: Laughlin Air Force Base
Description: The 47th Flying Training Wing's mission since 1972 is to train pilots for the United States Air Force, Air Force Reserve, Air National Guard and allied nation air forces. Today the wing utilizes the T-6A Texan II and T-38C Talon aircraft to perform this mission, while striving, every day, to build mission ready, resilient Airmen, leaders, and pilots.

Name: Association Marocaine du développement économique et créativité AMDEC
Description:
L’Association Marocaine du Développement Économique et Créativité (AMDEC) est une organisation reconnue à l’échelle nationale, disposant de bureaux stratégiquement implantés à travers tout le Maroc. Elle se dédie à la promotion de l’entrepreneuriat en offrant formation, accompagnement et soutien à l’ensemble des acteurs du secteur économique. AMDEC cible particulièrement les jeunes porteurs de projets, qu’ils soient micro, petits ou moyens entrepreneurs, ainsi que les coopératives, auto-entrepreneurs et intermédiaires.

L’association met un point d’honneur à renforcer les compétences entrepreneuriales et à favoriser la création de valeur ajoutée. Son action s’étend sur plusieurs niveaux – local, régional, national et même international – avec une attention particulière portée à l’inclusion des personnes en situation de handicap, des populations vulnérables et des femmes rurales. Par ses initiatives, AMDEC contribue activement à un développement économique et social équilibré et durable des territoires marocains.

Name: Costanzo Air Flight School
Description: Costanzo Air Flight School offers flexible flight training to help you accomplish your dream of becoming a pilot. Whether you are new to aviation or are looking to build your skills and earn new certificates, we will customize our flight instruction approach to make you a safe, skilled, and proficient pilot. Our instructors are lifelong aviators who are passionate about mentoring you at your pace and schedule.

Name: Drone Crew - Aerial Imagery
Description:
Drone Crew is a Portuguese registered brand founded in 2022, specialized in delivering advanced drone training programs for remote pilots operating within military, police, and first responder UAS (Unmanned Aerial Systems) teams. 

Our team is composed of highly experienced remote pilots from Portuguese security forces and firefighters, bringing decades of real-world military, law enforcement and emergency expertise to the training field. At Drone Crew, we understand the critical nature of tactical drone operations, which is why our programs are designed to prepare pilots for high-stakes missions. 

We offer specialized tactical drone piloting training for organizations, combining traditional classroom instruction with immersive, scenario-based tactical environments. This hybrid approach ensures our trainees are not only knowledgeable but also operationally ready for the dynamic challenges faced in the field. 

Drone Crew—Training today for tomorrow’s missions.

Name: Simservices
Description: Wir als Team verstehen uns als ihr Dienstleister und Partner für komplexe, technische Aufgaben aller Art, wir arbeiten mit ihnen gemeinsam an der Optimierung ihrer Prozesse und steigern so ihre Produktivität und Effizienz. Dabei hat die Qualität unserer Dienstleistungen für uns einen sehr hohen Stellenwert. Mit unserer flexiblen und sehr kundenorientierten Arbeitsweise intensivieren wir ihren Erfolg. Nur wenn sie erfolgreich sind sind wir es auch.

Name: CAE Melbourne Flight Training
Description: High quality integrated pilot training based at Moorabbin Airport in Melbourne Australia.

Name: HMK USA LLC
Description: HMK USA LLC (“HMK”) is a privately owned US defense contractor with the US State Department licenses to export and broker defense services. HMK provides the US allies with a wide range of services in aviation and aerospace industries including aircraft life cycle management, air crew development and manpower solutions. HMK is focused on providing advanced training to the US allied air forces to operate and maintain their US manufactured military aircraft. HMK’s veteran instructors with decades of combat experience work hand in hand with the host militaries advancing their air crew to flight readiness all year round and squadrons to full operational capacity. HMK is currently pursuing establishing the first ever privately owned and operated air crew and maintenance state of art C-130J Super Hercules schoolhouse in the Kingdom of Bahrain and a Black Hawk schoolhouse in Republic of Colombia. Both schoolhouses will have dedicated training aircraft, helicopters and full motion D-class simulators providing training to the operators worldwide.

Name: Fly EPT Spain
Description:
Fly EPT Spain flight school in Son Bonet Airport (LESB), PALMA de MALLORCA flies Tecnam P2002-JF and provides : - 
- Online EASA PPL(A) ground school
- Private Pilot Licence (PPL)
- Hour Building Spain
- ATPL Theory 
- CPL Preparation Program

Name: North Georgia Aviation
Description:
North Georgia Aviation is taking everyday people to new heights as North Georgia’s full-service flight school and Cirrus Training Center. We lead with knowledge, giving our students an intimate understanding of aviation.  Specializing in owner-aircraft instruction for proficiency and safety. When you fly with NGA, you fly with family.

In 2019, founder Bud DeWayne saw the necessity for a flight school to train pilots locally while offering an array of local aviation services, something the Gainesville, GA area was missing. Today, North Georgia Aviation is owned by Paul Bagley.

Our students at North Georgia Aviation come from all walks of life. Looking to start a lifelong career in aviation or seeking to ignite the passion for a long-running dream that hasn’t yet taken flight? Located in Gainesville, Georgia, North Georgia Aviation is located in the best place to give students the most time in the sky.

The students at North Georgia Aviation come from all walks of life. Looking to start a lifelong career in aviation or seeking to ignite the passion for a long-running dream that hasn’t yet taken flight? Our Certified Flight Instructors respect the responsibilities that come with the freedom of flight. Our programs are designed to take you to places you’ve never been before, utilizing advanced technologies in the classroom, the runway, and the sky, ensuring a smooth transition into the ever-evolving aviation world. 

If you’re already a seasoned pilot, North Georgia Aviation is the perfect flight school for you. We specialize in enhancing a pilot’s skills to prepare you for the certifications you seek. Additionally, we can help you achieve your instrument rating or introduce you to the more luxurious side of flying through our Cirrus Aircraft flight training.

Own your own aircraft? Great! We offer owner-aircraft training such as avionics review, and instruction. We work with aircraft-owner

Name: Realizar Escola de Aviação Civil
D-V-I Aviation
Description:
Un Objectif Clair : Rendre l’Aviation Accessible
L’ambition de DVI Aviation est claire et ambitieuse : permettre à chacun d’accéder au monde du pilotage, en proposant des formations adaptées et un accompagnement de qualité.

Dès son ouverture, l’école propose :
 Des cours de pilotage accessibles aux débutants comme aux passionnés avancés.
 Des forfaits de formation pour l’obtention de la Licence ULM.
 Des baptêmes de l’air pour permettre à tous de découvrir la magie du vol.

 Les points forts de D-V-I Aviation :
 Une pédagogie centrée sur la sécurité et l’excellence.
 Un suivi personnalisé et digitalisé, grâce à une plateforme dédiée.
 Une équipe d’instructeurs passionnés et qualifiés.

Name: The Aviator Coach
Description: Suntem primul start-up educațional românesc din aviație care oferă pregătire și dezvoltare profesională tinerilor ce își doresc sau urmează o carieră de pilot, însoțitor de bord sau dispecer de zbor!

Name: ELAN SWARM CONSULTING
Description:
Nous accompagnons les TPE et PME dans leur démarche RSE.
Cible : Réaliser Bilan à Impacts = Extra Financier Naturel et Humain

Gains : + de Marchés Publics / + de Chantiers attribués / Meilleure Visibilité / Marque employeur++ / Valeur Ajoutée ++ / Chaîne de Valeur optimisée / Business Plan aligné

Impacts Clients : Attractivité et fidélisation

Avec la loi CSRD du 01-01-24, nous sommes convaincus que les projets innovants sont ceux qui matérialisent les impacts RSE dès leur conception.

Aussi, nous collaborons à intégrer et valoriser les aspects environnementaux dans vos projets pour qu'ils soient vraiment identifiés durables et soutenables par les donneurs d'ordres, d'autant plus ceux qui sont dans l'obligation de réaliser des reporting extra-financier. 

1 Charge devenant 1 Bénéfice Ecologique, votre Bilan / Compte de Résultat et Annexes deviennent des atouts qui vous font devenir une partie prenante pertinente des donneurs d'ordres.

A votre écoute pour toutes questions esc@Elan-Swarm.fr

Passons à la RSE augmentée 4.0
A vos côtés ... prenez de l'avance

Name: Pilots and Drones
Description: Pilots and Drones' goal is to get quality Pilots, quality jobs. We vet pilots for companies that are looking for highly skilled talent, we also help pilots get the proper compensation for their time.

Name: Airunit Flightschool
Description:
Airunit is gelegen op de voormalige luchtmachtbasis van Brustem. Heden gekend als Droneport.
Onze missie is de droom van vliegen in en rond de eigenstreek waar te maken!
Dit doen we hoofdzakelijk door privé piloten (PPL)  op te leiden via onze vliegopleiding, onder het motto "outstanding instruction". Voor zij die het vliegen eens willen ervaren in eigen streek, bieden we rondvluchten aan. Als laatste troef verhuren we vliegtuigen aan piloten zodat zij zonder zorgen hun hobby kunnen uitvoeren.

Name: Qantas Group Pilot Academy/Flight Training Adelaide QUEENSLAND
FlyBright Pilot Academy
Description:
At FlyBright, we're dedicated to shaping the next generation of aviation leaders through comprehensive training programs, cutting-edge technology, and a commitment to excellence.

FlyBright Pilot Academy is a premier flight training institution offering a range of courses designed to empower aspiring pilots with the skills and knowledge needed to succeed in the dynamic world of aviation. With state-of-the-art facilities, experienced instructors, and a passion for flight, we provide a supportive environment where students can thrive and achieve their aviation aspirations.

 When you join FlyBright Pilot Academy, you're not just enrolling in a training program – you're becoming part of a supportive community of aviation enthusiasts. Whether you're connecting with fellow students, networking with industry professionals, or participating in aviation events and seminars, you'll find endless opportunities to grow and thrive as you work towards your ratings and certificates.

Ready to take the first step towards your aviation career? Visit our website to learn more about our programs and how you can soar to new heights with FlyBright Pilot Academy!

Website: ww.iflybright.com

Name: Bristol Aero Club (Gloucester Airport)
Description: An inclusive, not for profit flying club that offers LAPL, PPL, Night Rating and IR(R) rating training. We can accommodate disabled students who require a rudder hand controller.

Name: HELI NRW GmbH
Description:
Heli NRW GmbH, based at the strategic location of Mönchengladbach Airport, stands as a beacon of excellence in the world of helicopter aviation. Since our inception in 2011, our passion for flying has driven us to offer a wide range of helicopter-related services, catering to both aviation enthusiasts and professionals alike.

Our Flight School, renowned for its personal and competent approach, offers a comprehensive range of training programs. These include Private Pilot License (PPL-H), Commercial Pilot License (CPL-H), and Airline Transport Pilot License (ATPL-H) for helicopters, along with specialized type ratings for various helicopter models like Robinson R44, Guimbal Cabri, Airbus H120 and Airbus H125. Our training is designed to cater to both beginners and experienced pilots seeking to expand their skills and certifications.

For those seeking adventure or a unique gift, our Adventure Flights are a perfect choice. We offer the exhilarating opportunity to fly a helicopter yourself under expert supervision, alongside a variety of sightseeing flights over the picturesque landscapes of North Rhine-Westphalia, the Netherlands, and Belgium. These flights provide unforgettable views and experiences, making them ideal gifts for loved ones or thrilling adventures for oneself.

In addition to our training and adventure services, Heli NRW also provides tailored helicopter solutions for corporate needs. Whether it’s for business transportation, aerial surveys, or any other specialized requirement, our fleet and experienced pilots are ready to deliver safe and efficient services.

At Heli NRW, we are not just about flying helicopters; we are about creating memorable experiences in the sky. Our commitment to safety, quality, and customer satisfaction makes us a leading choice for anyone looking to explore the world of helicopters, whether as a career, a hobby, or a unique adventure. Join us at Heli NRW, where every flight is a journey of passion and excellence.

Name: Blue Hill Helicopters
Description: Blue hill helicopters - Helicopter flight training, helicopter simulator, photo flights, Boston tours. Operated by experienced pilots for over 10 years. Helicopter flight training in Boston

Name: Lwili Drone Solutions (LDS) SARL
Description: Drone Services Providers , Drone Pilot Training

Name: Yorkshire Aero Club
Description:
We’re Yorkshire Aero Club, an MOD ELCAS and CAA approved ATO.

Based at Sandtoft Airfield in Lincolnshire and with a satellite office at former Doncaster Sheffield Airport in South Yorkshire, we’re well positioned for Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Derbyshire and Nottinghamshire.

Whether you’ve flown before and have hundreds of hours under your belt or are taking the first steps to learning to fly, our team are on hand to help you.

We offer full training of the PPL and LAPL syllabus, as well as FRTOL examinations, night, IR (R) rating and Flight Instructor Course (FIC) training. YAC is also an approved Ministry of Defence (MoD) training provider. In addition to formal courses of training, we also offer Introductory Flying Lessons which can make an excellent gift for the budding pilot.

Please do give us a call on 01302 247 911 or send us a message if you have any questions.

https://www.trustpilot.com/review/yac.uk
https://twitter.com/yorkshireaero
https://www.facebook.com/YorkshireAeroClub/
https://www.instagram.com/yorkshireaeroclub/

Name: Sky training
Description:
Centre de formation aéronautique, Sky training propose, en Loire Atlantique (44), des moyens modernes pour découvrir, apprendre et se perfectionner au pilotage d'avion. 

De l'initiation au pilotage à la formation au complète au brevet de pilote privé et professionnel. Prestations sur-mesure dédiées aux entreprises, l'offre de Sky training est multiple ... tout comme les profils de pilotes que Sky training forme au quotidien !

Le centre exploite des avions récents (le Diamond DA40-G1000) à l'aéroport de St Nazaire-Montoir et un simulateur de vol professionnel de toute dernière génération dans le coeur de Nantes. 

Pour en savoir plus sur Sky training : www.skytraining.fr

Name: Bali International Flight Academy
Description:
The Bali International Flight Academy (BIFA) was established in Bali in 2009, with the vision of imparting quality aviation training in order to produce world class aviation professionals while conforming to stringent ICAO requirements of flight safety.

The campus is close to Singaraja which is an integrated education zone in Bali,

Since its inception, over 787 students have graduated from BIFA’s various training program. Over 650 of our graduates have been absorbed and employed by the Indonesian national flag carrier, Garuda while sizeable number of our graduates are employed by other Indonesian airlines such as Air Asia, Sriwijaya Air, Citilink, Lion Group. Also air charter operators like TransNusa, Susi Air, Travira Air etc.

Name: SF Aviation Consulting & Training
Description: We provide operational audit, AOC support, operational management, expertise for operational assessment, crews training, projects management, coordination with local CAA, accident / incident investigation and operator manuals production.

Name: Flight Culture
Description:
Flight Culture exists to promote a thoughtful, progressive approach to paragliding and paramotoring — one that values skill, judgment and community as much as the freedom of being airborne.

At its core, Flight Culture is about developing confident pilots, not just qualified ones. We believe that good training is only the starting point; real progression comes from shared experience, honest conversation and a culture that encourages continual learning and respect for the air.

Flight Culture brings together pilots, instructors and enthusiasts through training experiences, events, travel and storytelling. Whether someone is taking their first steps into flight or refining existing skills, the emphasis remains the same: sound decision-making, personal responsibility and long-term enjoyment of the sport.

The brand reflects a lifestyle as much as an activity. Many within the Flight Culture community balance professional lives with a passion for flying, adventure and exploration. For them, flight is not about adrenaline or shortcuts, but about mastery, perspective and the quiet satisfaction of doing something well.

By fostering high standards, open knowledge-sharing and supportive networks, Flight Culture aims to raise the quality of participation across airsports — helping pilots fly better, think clearly and stay engaged for life.

Ultimately, Flight Culture is about more than flying itself. It is about how people approach learning, challenge and freedom, and the shared values that make flight sustainable, rewarding and meaningful.

Name: AeroPrecision Drones
Description: Welcome to our team! With decades of combined experience in both private and commercial aviation, we bring a wealth of knowledge to the table. We are excited to share our passion aviation and creativity with you.

Name: SimClimb
Description:
TIJ | Somos el mejor centro de adiestramiento de la región. Contamos con un simulador de Airbus A320, donde se imparten sesiones de adiestramiento a pilotos de línea aérea, estudiantes de aviación y pilotos de otros segmentos que buscan realizar su transición a aviación comercial.
Nuestras horas de vuelo son reconocidas por una de las aerolíneas Low-Cost más importantes del país.

Name: Ytsera Air
Description:
Located in Lyndonville, Vermont, Ytsera Air Flight School provides a transformative aviation education experience. 

From Discovery Flights to in-depth Private Pilot Training, we cater to both beginners and seasoned aviators. We offer comprehensive In-Person and Online Ground School Courses, tailored Private Lessons, and servicing already established Pilots with services such as Instrument Rating, Biennial Flight Reviews, Advanced Flight Instruction, Safety Pilot Services, and others. 

We are more than just a school, we are a passionate community committed to empowering each individual on their journey towards mastering the skies. 

Contact us today to dive into an authentic and enriching aviation journey!

Name: Aviator Training Palm Beach LLC
Description: Specializing in Cirrus Aircraft. Manufacturer approved Cirrus Training Center. Flight Training School. Helping train pilots for Commercial ratings, Instrument ratings, flying proficiency.

Name: Mitiguy Aviation
Description:
Mitiguy Aviation is proud to announce the launch of its premier flight training program at Minute Man Air Field (6B6) in Stow, MA. Founded by longtime flight instructor and corporate pilot Trevor Mitiguy, the school is committed to offering high-quality, safety-focused flight instruction with a personalized and supportive approach.

Mitiguy Aviation provides training for Private Pilot, Instrument Rating, Commercial Pilot, and Certified Flight Instructor Certificates. Whether students are new to aviation or working toward a professional flying career, the school is designed to meet them where they are and help them achieve their goals on a flexible or accelerated schedule.

What sets Mitiguy Aviation apart is its emphasis on mentorship, community, and affordability. Students benefit from a roster of experienced instructors, well-maintained aircraft, and customized training plans that maximize efficiency and progress. Instruction is available seven days a week, with scenic rides and discovery flights also offered to the public.

The launch at Minute Man Air Field marks an exciting expansion of local flight training opportunities in the Boston Metro West area. Mitiguy Aviation is dedicated to making flying more accessible and enjoyable, with a family-style culture that fosters confidence and growth.

“We’re here to make learning to fly a fun, empowering, and safe experience,” says founder Trevor Mitiguy. “Our mission is to support every student in reaching their aviation goals; whether that's flying for fun, launching a new career, or simply challenging themselves to do something extraordinary.”

Flight training is available now! To learn more, visit their website at www.mitiguyaviation.com, email office@mitiguyaviation.com, or call (617) 446-9446.

Description:
Windy City Soaring Association (WCSA) is a non-profit organization, a 501(c)(7) social club, dedicated to the promotion and enjoyment of soaring. The purpose of the WCSA is to educate and train our members in the art and science of soaring, including flight training, all within a club atmosphere. As part of the educational mendate WCSA also offers intruductory flights to the public from April to November, allowing participants to learn about soaring and have an experience of a lifetime.

The range of our member's flying experience is broad: aviation beginners - student pilots (from teens to senior-citizens), seasoned multi rating instructors, airline pilots, cross country experts, and even a few record holders. 
- several of our members also participate in competitive flying.  We are organized as a volunteer working club wherein qualified members serve as administrative staff, ground crew, tow pilots, ride pilots, flight and ground instructors. 

WCSA is based at Hinckley Airport (0C2) in the friendly village of Hinckley, IL situated about fifty miles west of downtown Chicago, fly-in visits are welcomed if you are already a pilot.

Our club owns and operates two tow planes and several training club gliders, additionally many of our members also own their own gliders.

Come and fly with us! 

Contact us for details:
info@windycitysoaring.org

At Executive Flight Academy, we are dedicated to providing aspiring pilots with top-notch training and resources to achieve their aviation dreams. Located in Southern Utah, we offer a comprehensive range of flight training programs, including Private Pilot Licenses, Instrument Ratings, and advanced certifications.

Our fleet features state-of-the-art aircraft, including the Cirrus SR-20 G7 and G6, ensuring our students receive the best hands-on experience possible. With experienced instructors, personalized training plans, and a commitment to safety, we equip our students with the skills and knowledge needed for successful careers in aviation.

Join us at Executive Flight Academy, where your journey to the skies begins!

Name: FlyUp Aviation Academy
Description:
FlyUp Aviation Academy S.L. is a professional pilot training organization engaged in various types of pilot training and licensed by the Spanish Aviation Authority (AESA) and Austro Control. Mainly specializing in ab-initio ("from zero") training programs, we also offer advanced pilot courses, license conversions, and various aviation services. 

We take pride in adopting safety and professionalism in all aspects of flight training that we provide. Our mission is simple and impactful - it focuses on making the journey of becoming a pilot affordable to everyone without interfering with the quality and safety of the flight training standards.

Name: ASK Aviation
Description:
The path to a pilot's career is complex and often filled with misinformation. Aspiring aviators need a training partner they can trust.

Welcome to ASK Aviation.

Our name is our ethos. We are your trusted partner in professional pilot development, dedicated to providing pilots with the Attitude, Skills, and Knowledge (ASK) they require to become not just successful, but exceptional.

We are your co-pilot for that entire journey. Our mission is to be the most honest, transparent, and valuable resource for pilots by providing a lifelong pathway to a successful career through our comprehensive services.


OUR DIGITAL SERVICES & COMMUNITY:

Our entire platform is built on the "Trusted Advisor Model". We lead with value, build a community, and earn your trust by helping you, not selling to you. Our services include:

- Career Guidance & Expert Mentorship: We will connect you with a panel of expert pilot mentors for guidance on career goals, structuring your modular training, type ratings, command upgrades and more.

- The ASK Aviation CPD Hub: A dynamic learning platform featuring interactive modules, simplified guides to complex topics (like ETOPS & Dangerous Goods), and community discussion forums.

- Professional Development & Theory: We provide a platform for theoretical knowledge instruction, professional seminars, and specialised workshops, including airline interview and assessment preparation guidance.

- Honest, High-Value Content: We are the antidote to "false marketing". Our blog, articles, and downloadable resources are designed to answer the tough questions, from "The True Cost of a PPL" to "Decoding Flight School Promises".

From your first day of research to your command upgrade, ASK Aviation is your career partner, providing the tools, mentorship, and transparent guidance you need to achieve your goals.

JOIN OUR COMMUNITY

Follow our page for industry insights, professional development advice, and to help us build a more transparent aviation community.

With training bases in George and Beaufort West, AIFA delivers Integrated Commercial Pilot Licence (CPL) and modular PPL/CPL programmes, instructor ratings, and multi-engine training—all aligned with international aviation standards.

Our modern fleet includes Garmin G-500 and G-1000 equipped aircraft, supported by state-of-the-art Alsim FNPT II simulators, ensuring cadets train in realistic, airline-relevant environments. AIFA’s commitment to safety, quality, and operational excellence prepares graduates for careers with leading airlines, charter companies, and cargo operators worldwide.

For over a decade, AIFA has trained pilots from across Africa, Asia, and the Middle East, providing comprehensive support in accommodation, visa assistance, and student welfare. Whether you're an airline seeking a reliable training partner or a cadet ready to take off, AIFA is your gateway to a global aviation career.

 Passerelle B78 
• Boîte automatique → manuelle 

 Un apprentissage moderne et encadré :
• Cours de code en salle et en ligne
• Simulateur pour débutants 
• Suivi personnalisé avec des moniteurs expérimentés 

 Financements possibles • CPF • Permis à 1€/jour • Aides France Travail 

 Sérieux et fiabilité
 • Certification Qualiopi 
• Label Sécurité Routière 

 À deux pas de la gare d’Orléans, l’auto-école est facilement accessible. 
 Chez Soltani, apprendre à conduire, c’est bien plus qu’un permis : c’est acquérir confiance, autonomie et sérénité sur la route. 

Notre slogan, une vraie promesse :  “Soltani, un permis réussi.”

Name: Aéroclub André Tesson
Description:
Créé en 1937, l’aéroclub André Tesson Rueil-Malmaison, organisme de formation agréé (ATO), est un aéroclub convivial à taille humaine qui rassemble environ une cinquantaine de membres. 
Basé sur l’aérodrome de Saint-Cyr l’Ecole, en bordure des jardins du château de Versailles, il dispose d’un cadre particulièrement privilégié !

Name: CFCS Centre de formation par stage
Description:
Le CFCS est présent à Bourgoin-Jallieu depuis 1978. Nos moniteurs ont tous reçu une formation adéquate et sont donc tous diplômés. Ils vous enseignent la théorie et la pratique et vous apprennent comment vous comporter sur les routes et faire face aux difficultés rencontrées.
Nous vous préparons professionnellement au plaisir de la conduite et de la mobilité dans des véhicules d’excellente qualité et avec les méthodes d’apprentissage les plus modernes telle la conduite économique…
Nous mettons à votre disposition des moyens pédagogiques modernes et adaptés.
Nous sommes les seuls sur Bourgoin-Jallieu à disposer d’une piste de formation privée vous permettant d’évoluer et d’apprendre en toute quiétude et sécurité. Nous disposons d’un simulateur de perte d’adhérence vous permettant de vous initier aux risques de la conduite sur terrain glissant…

Name: AvianTech Institute For Aviation Training Center
Avanti Aviation

Name: Austin Aviation Training
Description: Welcome to Austin Aviation, Austin’s trusted destination for professional flight training. Whether you’re pursuing a Private Pilot License, Instrument Rating, or Commercial Pilot License, our modern aviation programs are designed to help you succeed. We offer flexible scheduling, dedicated career instructors with real-world flying experience, and a streamlined curriculum that fits your lifestyle. Located in the heart of Central Texas, our flight school serves aspiring pilots from Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Leander, and beyond. Discover why Austin Aviation is the top choice for pilot training in Austin—where safety, precision, and real-world readiness take flight.

Name: Instacfi.com
Description:
At InstaCFI.com, we are revolutionizing aviation education by connecting flight instructors to students and flight sim enthusiasts through convenient online video meetings. Our platform provides a seamless and efficient way for aspiring pilots or flight sim* users to access expert guidance and instruction from anywhere. InstaCFI.com is designed from the ground up to augment in-flight and ground training with additional remote learning.

Our mission is to empower aviation enthusiasts worldwide by breaking down geographical barriers and making quality instruction accessible to all. We understand that finding the right flight instructor and scheduling lessons can be challenging, especially for those with busy lives. That’s why we’ve developed an innovative platform that connects you directly with certified flight instructors, ensuring personalized training, and maximum convenience.

Description: ASD Aeroclub Treviso, basato presso l'Aeroporto Internazionale Canova di Treviso. Formazione completa per piloti privati e commerciali con istruttori qualificati e flotta moderna. La tua carriera nel mondo dell'aviazione inizia qui.

Whether you're beginning your aviation journey or advancing your skills, we deliver clear guidance, real-world expertise, and a commitment to your success.

Name: SkyWings Aviation
Description:
SkyWings Aviation | North Georgia Flight School

At SkyWings Aviation, we specialize in turning aspiring aviators into confident, certified pilots. Based in North Georgia, our mission is to provide top-tier flight training with a focus on safety, precision, and professionalism.

Whether you’re starting from zero hours or working toward advanced certifications, our experienced instructors and modern fleet ensure a high-quality learning environment tailored to your goals.

Private Pilot | Instrument | Commercial | CFI Training
Take your first step toward the skies—your future in aviation starts here!
